  422|       |	void clean_monero_block_broadcasts();
  423|       |	void submit_monero_blocks();
  424|       |
  425|       |	// Anti-spam broadcast throttle
  426|       |	struct BroadcastThrottle
  427|       |	{
  428|       |		BroadcastThrottle()
  429|      0|			: m_startTime{}
  430|      0|			, m_count{}
  431|      0|		{}
  432|       |
  433|       |		// Time unit is 1 second for a default sidechain config.
  434|       |		// It can vary depending on the sidechain (i.e. it's 3 seconds for p2pool-nano)
  435|       |		static constexpr uint64_t LIMITS[][2] = {
  436|       |			{   1,  10 }, // no more than  10 broadcasts in   1 time unit  (100x the normal block rate)
  437|       |			{  60,  60 }, // no more than  60 broadcasts in  60 time units ( 10x the normal block rate)
  438|       |			{ 600, 180 }, // no more than 180 broadcasts in 600 time units (  3x the normal block rate)
  439|       |		};
  440|       |
  441|       |		enum { N = array_size(LIMITS) };
  442|       |
  443|      0|		static constexpr bool check_limits() {
  444|      0|			for (int i = 0; i < N; ++i) {
  445|      0|				for (int j = 0; j < 2; ++j) {
  446|      0|					// Can't be zero or too big
  447|      0|					if (!LIMITS[i][j] || (LIMITS[i][j] > 100000)) {
  448|      0|						return false;
  449|      0|					}
  450|      0|
  451|      0|					// Both timeout and max number of broadcasts must be increasing
  452|      0|					if (i && (LIMITS[i][j] <= LIMITS[i - 1][j])) {
  453|      0|						return false;
  454|      0|					}
  455|      0|				}
  456|      0|			}
  457|      0|			return true;
  458|      0|		}
  459|       |
  460|       |		uint64_t m_startTime[N];
  461|       |		uint32_t m_count[N];
  462|       |	};
  463|       |
  464|       |	unordered_map<hash, BroadcastThrottle> m_broadcastThrottle;
  465|       |
  466|       |	void clean_broadcast_throttle_data();
  467|       |	bool throttle_broadcast(const P2PClient* client, uint64_t timestamp_mcs);
  468|       |};
  469|       |
  470|       |} // namespace p2pool

  670|       |void p2pool::update_aux_data(const hash& chain_id)
  671|      0|{
  672|      0|	if (m_stopped) {
  673|      0|		return;
  674|      0|	}
  675|       |
  676|      0|	MinerData data;
  677|      0|	std::vector<hash> aux_id;
  678|       |
  679|      0|#ifdef WITH_MERGE_MINING_DONATION
  680|      0|	std::vector<IMergeMiningClient::ChainParameters> mm_donation_params;
  681|      0|	uint64_t mm_donation_params_last_updated;
  682|      0|	{
  683|      0|		ReadLock lock(m_auxJobDonationLock);
  684|      0|		mm_donation_params = m_auxJobDonation;
  685|      0|		mm_donation_params_last_updated = m_auxJobDonationLastUpdated;
  686|      0|	}
  687|       |
  688|      0|	const uint64_t t = seconds_since_epoch();
  689|       |
  690|      0|	if (!mm_donation_params.empty()) {
  691|      0|		LOGINFO(5, "update_aux_data: there are " << mm_donation_params.size() << " aux chain datas for merge mining donation, last updated " << (t - mm_donation_params_last_updated) << " seconds ago");
  692|      0|	}
  693|      0|#endif
  694|       |
  695|      0|	{
  696|      0|		ReadLock lock(m_mergeMiningClientsLock);
  697|       |
  698|      0|		if (!m_mergeMiningClients.empty()) {
  699|      0|			data.aux_chains.reserve(m_mergeMiningClients.size());
  700|       |
  701|      0|			aux_id.reserve(m_mergeMiningClients.size() + 1);
  702|       |
  703|      0|			IMergeMiningClient::ChainParameters chain_params;
  704|       |
  705|      0|			for (const IMergeMiningClient* c : m_mergeMiningClients) {
  706|      0|				if (c->get_params(chain_params)) {
  707|      0|					data.aux_chains.emplace_back(chain_params.aux_id, chain_params.aux_hash, chain_params.aux_diff);
  708|      0|					aux_id.emplace_back(chain_params.aux_id);
  709|       |
  710|      0|#ifdef WITH_MERGE_MINING_DONATION
  711|       |					// If the user is already merge mining this chain, don't use it for donation
  712|      0|					mm_donation_params.erase(std::remove_if(mm_donation_params.begin(), mm_donation_params.end(), [&chain_params](const auto& t) { return t.aux_id == chain_params.aux_id; }), mm_donation_params.end());
  713|      0|#endif
  714|      0|				}
  715|      0|			}
  716|      0|		}
  717|      0|	}
  718|       |
  719|      0|#ifdef WITH_MERGE_MINING_DONATION
  720|       |	// Use the donation job for 30 minutes at most if it doesn't get updated anymore
  721|      0|	if (t <= mm_donation_params_last_updated + 1800) {
  722|      0|		LOGINFO(5, "update_aux_data: using " << mm_donation_params.size() << " aux chain datas for merge mining donation");
  723|       |
  724|      0|		for (const IMergeMiningClient::ChainParameters& c : mm_donation_params) {
  725|      0|			data.aux_chains.emplace_back(c.aux_id, c.aux_hash, c.aux_diff);
  726|      0|			aux_id.emplace_back(c.aux_id);
  727|      0|		}
  728|      0|	}
  729|      0|	else if (mm_donation_params_last_updated) {
  730|      0|		LOGINFO(5, "update_aux_data: merge mining donation data is stale, not using it");
  731|      0|	}
  732|      0|#endif
  733|       |
  734|      0|	aux_id.emplace_back(m_sideChain->consensus_hash());
  735|      0|	{
  736|      0|		WriteLock lock(m_auxIdLock);
  737|       |
  738|      0|		if (aux_id == m_auxId) {
  739|      0|			data.aux_nonce = m_auxNonce;
  740|      0|		}
  741|      0|		else if (find_aux_nonce(aux_id, data.aux_nonce)) {
  742|      0|			m_auxId = std::move(aux_id);
  743|      0|			m_auxNonce = data.aux_nonce;
  744|      0|		}
  745|      0|		else {
  746|      0|			LOGERR(1, "update_aux_data: failed to find the aux nonce for merge mining. Merge mining will be off this round.");
  747|      0|			data.aux_chains.clear();
  748|      0|		}
  749|      0|	}
  750|       |
  751|      0|	{
  752|      0|		WriteLock lock(m_minerDataLock);
  753|       |
  754|      0|		if ((m_minerData.aux_nonce == data.aux_nonce) && (m_minerData.aux_chains == data.aux_chains)) {
  755|      0|			return;
  756|      0|		}
  757|       |
  758|      0|		m_minerData.aux_chains = data.aux_chains;
  759|      0|		m_minerData.aux_nonce = data.aux_nonce;
  760|      0|		LOGINFO(5, "update_aux_data: n_aux_chains = " << m_minerData.aux_chains.size() << ", aux_nonce = " << m_minerData.aux_nonce);
  761|      0|	}
  762|       |
  763|      0|	if (!chain_id.empty()) {
  764|      0|		LOGINFO(4, "update_aux_data: new aux data from chain " << chain_id);
  765|       |
  766|      0|		if (!is_main_thread()) {
  767|      0|			update_block_template_async();
  768|      0|		}
  769|      0|		else {
  770|      0|			update_block_template();
  771|      0|		}
  772|       |
  773|       |#if defined(WITH_MERGE_MINING_DONATION) && defined(WITH_TLS)
  774|       |		send_aux_job_donation();
  775|       |#endif
  776|       |
  777|      0|		api_update_aux_data();
  778|      0|	}

  780|       |
  781|       |#ifdef WITH_MERGE_MINING_DONATION
  782|       |void p2pool::send_aux_job_donation()
  783|      0|{
  784|       |#ifdef WITH_TLS
  785|       |	if (m_params.m_authorKeyFile.empty()) {
  786|       |		return;
  787|       |	}
  788|       |
  789|       |	std::ifstream f(m_params.m_authorKeyFile, std::ios::binary | std::ios::ate);
  790|       |
  791|       |	if (!f.good()) {
  792|       |		LOGERR(1, "send_aux_job_donation: failed to open " << m_params.m_authorKeyFile);
  793|       |		return;
  794|       |	}
  795|       |
  796|       |	Params::AuthorKey key;
  797|       |	ON_SCOPE_LEAVE([&key](){ secure_zero_memory(key); });
  798|       |
  799|       |	if (f.tellg() != static_cast<std::streampos>(sizeof(key))) {
  800|       |		LOGERR(1, "send_aux_job_donation: " << m_params.m_authorKeyFile << " has an invalid size");
  801|       |		return;
  802|       |	}
  803|       |
  804|       |	f.seekg(0);
  805|       |	f.read(reinterpret_cast<char*>(&key), sizeof(key));
  806|       |
  807|       |	if (!f.good()) {
  808|       |		LOGERR(1, "send_aux_job_donation: failed to read data from " << m_params.m_authorKeyFile);
  809|       |		return;
  810|       |	}
  811|       |
  812|       |	const uint64_t timestamp = time(nullptr);
  813|       |
  814|       |	if (timestamp >= read_unaligned(reinterpret_cast<uint64_t*>(key.expiration_time))) {
  815|       |		LOGERR(1, "send_aux_job_donation: " << m_params.m_authorKeyFile << " is expired");
  816|       |		return;
  817|       |	}
  818|       |
  819|       |	const uint8_t* p = reinterpret_cast<uint8_t*>(&key);
  820|       |
  821|       |	if (!ED25519_verify(p, sizeof(key.pub_key) + sizeof(key.expiration_time), key.master_key_signature, ED25519_MASTER_PUBLIC_KEY)) {
  822|       |		LOGERR(1, "send_aux_job_donation: " << m_params.m_authorKeyFile << ": signature verification failed");
  823|       |		return;
  824|       |	}
  825|       |
  826|       |	std::vector<uint8_t> job;
  827|       |	job.reserve(512);
  828|       |
  829|       |	constexpr uint32_t DATA_OFFSET = sizeof(key.pub_key) + sizeof(key.expiration_time) + sizeof(key.master_key_signature);
  830|       |
  831|       |	job.assign(p, p + DATA_OFFSET);
  832|       |
  833|       |	job.insert(job.end(), reinterpret_cast<const uint8_t*>(&timestamp), reinterpret_cast<const uint8_t*>(&timestamp) + sizeof(uint64_t));
  834|       |
  835|       |	{
  836|       |		ReadLock lock(m_minerDataLock);
  837|       |
  838|       |		if (m_minerData.aux_chains.empty()) {
  839|       |			LOGERR(1, "send_aux_job_donation: no merge mined chains found");
  840|       |			return;
  841|       |		}
  842|       |
  843|       |		for (const AuxChainData& c : m_minerData.aux_chains) {
  844|       |			job.insert(job.end(), c.unique_id.h, c.unique_id.h + HASH_SIZE);
  845|       |			job.insert(job.end(), c.data.h, c.data.h + HASH_SIZE);
  846|       |			job.insert(job.end(), reinterpret_cast<const uint8_t*>(&c.difficulty), reinterpret_cast<const uint8_t*>(&c.difficulty) + sizeof(difficulty_type));
  847|       |		}
  848|       |	}
  849|       |

  858|       |		return;

 1484|       |void p2pool::update_median_timestamp()
 1485|      0|{
 1486|      0|	uint64_t timestamps[TIMESTAMP_WINDOW];
 1487|      0|	if (!get_timestamps(timestamps))
 1488|      0|	{

 1490|      0|		m_minerData.median_timestamp = 0;
 1491|      0|		return;
 1492|      0|	}

 1499|       |
 1500|      0|	WriteLock lock(m_minerDataLock);
 1501|      0|	m_minerData.median_timestamp = ts;

 1543|       |void p2pool::load_found_blocks()
 1544|      0|{
 1545|      0|	if (!m_api || m_stopped) {
 1546|      0|		return;
 1547|      0|	}
 1548|       |

 1550|      0|	if (!f.is_open()) {
 1551|      0|		return;
 1552|      0|	}
 1553|       |
 1554|      0|	while (f.good()) {
 1555|      0|		time_t timestamp;
 1556|      0|		f >> timestamp;
 1557|      0|		if (!f.good()) break;
 1558|       |
 1559|      0|		uint64_t height;
 1560|      0|		f >> height;
 1561|      0|		if (!f.good()) break;
 1562|       |
 1563|      0|		hash id;
 1564|      0|		f >> id;
 1565|      0|		if (!f.good()) break;
 1566|       |
 1567|      0|		difficulty_type block_difficulty;
 1568|      0|		f >> block_difficulty;
 1569|      0|		if (!f.good()) break;
 1570|       |
 1571|      0|		difficulty_type cumulative_difficulty;
 1572|      0|		f >> cumulative_difficulty;
 1573|      0|		if (!f.good() && !f.eof()) break;
 1574|       |
 1575|      0|		m_foundBlocks.emplace_back(timestamp, height, id, block_difficulty, cumulative_difficulty);
 1576|      0|	}

 1581|       |void p2pool::parse_get_info_rpc(const char* data, size_t size)
 1582|      0|{

 1589|       |

 1591|      0|		LOGWARN(1, "get_info RPC response is invalid (\"result\" not found), trying again in 1 second");
 1592|      0|		std::this_thread::sleep_for(std::chrono::milliseconds(1000));
 1593|      0|		switch_host();
 1594|      0|		get_info();
 1595|      0|		return;
 1596|      0|	}
 1597|       |
 1598|      0|	const auto& result = doc["result"];
 1599|       |

 1601|      0|		bool busy_syncing, synchronized, mainnet, testnet, stagenet;
 1602|      0|	} info;
 1603|       |
 1604|      0|	if (!PARSE(result, info, busy_syncing) ||
 1605|      0|		!PARSE(result, info, synchronized) ||
 1606|      0|		!PARSE(result, info, mainnet) ||
 1607|      0|		!PARSE(result, info, testnet) ||

 1609|      0|		LOGWARN(1, "get_info RPC response is invalid, trying again in 1 second");
 1610|      0|		std::this_thread::sleep_for(std::chrono::milliseconds(1000));

 1612|      0|		get_info();

 1620|      0|		get_info();

 1661|       |void p2pool::parse_get_version_rpc(const char* data, size_t size)
 1662|      0|{
 1663|      0|	if (m_stopped) {
 1664|      0|		return;
 1665|      0|	}
 1666|       |
 1667|      0|	rapidjson::Document doc;
 1668|      0|	doc.Parse(data, size);
 1669|       |
 1670|      0|	if (doc.HasParseError() || !doc.IsObject() || !doc.HasMember("result")) {
 1671|      0|		LOGWARN(1, "get_version RPC response is invalid (\"result\" not found), trying again in 1 second");
 1672|      0|		std::this_thread::sleep_for(std::chrono::milliseconds(1000));
 1673|      0|		get_version();
 1674|      0|		return;
 1675|      0|	}
 1676|       |
 1677|      0|	const auto& result = doc["result"];
 1678|       |
 1679|      0|	std::string status;
 1680|      0|	uint64_t version;
 1681|       |
 1682|      0|	if (!parseValue(result, "status", status) || !parseValue(result, "version", version)) {
 1683|      0|		LOGWARN(1, "get_version RPC response is invalid, trying again in 1 second");
 1684|      0|		std::this_thread::sleep_for(std::chrono::milliseconds(1000));
 1685|      0|		get_version();
 1686|      0|		return;
 1687|      0|	}
 1688|       |
 1689|      0|	if (status != "OK") {
 1690|      0|		LOGWARN(1, "get_version RPC failed, trying again in 1 second");
 1691|      0|		std::this_thread::sleep_for(std::chrono::milliseconds(1000));
 1692|      0|		get_version();
 1693|      0|		return;
 1694|      0|	}
 1695|       |
 1696|      0|	constexpr uint64_t major = 3;
 1697|      0|	constexpr uint64_t minor = 10;
 1698|      0|	constexpr uint64_t required = (major << 16) | minor;
 1699|       |
 1700|      0|	if (version < required) {
 1701|      0|		const uint64_t version_hi = version >> 16;
 1702|      0|		const uint64_t version_lo = version & 65535;
 1703|      0|		const uint64_t required_version_hi = required >> 16;
 1704|      0|		const uint64_t required_version_lo = required & 65535;
 1705|      0|		LOGERR(1, "monerod RPC v" << version_hi << '.' << version_lo << " is incompatible, update to RPC >= v" << required_version_hi << '.' << required_version_lo << " (Monero v0.18.0.0 or newer)");
 1706|      0|		PANIC_STOP();
 1707|      0|	}
 1708|       |
 1709|      0|	get_miner_data();

 1750|       |void p2pool::parse_get_miner_data_rpc(const char* data, size_t size)
 1751|      0|{
 1752|      0|	if (m_stopped) {
 1753|      0|		return;
 1754|      0|	}
 1755|       |

 1760|      0|		return;
 1761|      0|	}

 1763|       |

 1765|      0|	doc.Parse(data, size);
 1766|       |
 1767|      0|	if (doc.HasParseError() || !doc.IsObject() || !doc.HasMember("result")) {
 1768|      0|		LOGWARN(1, "get_miner_data RPC response is invalid, skipping it");
 1769|      0|		return;
 1770|      0|	}
 1771|       |
 1772|      0|	MinerData minerData;
 1773|       |

 1775|       |

 1777|      0|		!PARSE(result, minerData, height) ||
 1778|      0|		!PARSE(result, minerData, prev_id) ||
 1779|      0|		!PARSE(result, minerData, seed_hash) ||
 1780|      0|		!PARSE(result, minerData, median_weight) ||

 1782|      0|		!PARSE(result, minerData, difficulty)) {
 1783|      0|		LOGWARN(1, "get_miner_data RPC response failed to parse, skipping it");
 1784|      0|		return;
 1785|      0|	}

 1790|      0|		const auto& tx_backlog = it->value.GetArray();

 1792|      0|			const auto& tx = tx_backlog[i];
 1793|       |
 1794|      0|			if (!tx.IsObject()) {
 1795|      0|				continue;
 1796|      0|			}
 1797|       |
 1798|      0|			TxMempoolData tx_data;

 1801|      0|				minerData.tx_backlog.emplace_back(std::move(tx_data));
 1802|      0|			}
 1803|      0|		}

 1809|      0|	}

 1899|      0|	}

 2067|       |
 2068|       |void p2pool::cleanup_mainchain_data(uint64_t height)
 2069|      0|{
 2070|       |	// Expects m_mainchainLock to be already locked here
 2071|       |	// Deletes everything older than 720 blocks, except for the 3-4 latest RandomX seed heights
 2072|       |
 2073|      0|	const uint64_t PRUNE_DISTANCE = BLOCK_HEADERS_REQUIRED;
 2074|       |
 2075|      0|	uint64_t seed_height = get_seed_height(height);
 2076|      0|	const uint64_t oldest_seed_height = (height > BLOCK_HEADERS_REQUIRED) ? get_seed_height(height - BLOCK_HEADERS_REQUIRED) : 0;
 2077|       |
 2078|      0|	std::vector<uint64_t> seed_heights;
 2079|      0|	seed_heights.reserve((seed_height - oldest_seed_height) / SEEDHASH_EPOCH_BLOCKS + 1);
 2080|       |
 2081|      0|	for (;;) {
 2082|      0|		seed_heights.emplace_back(seed_height);
 2083|      0|		if (seed_height <= std::max(oldest_seed_height, SEEDHASH_EPOCH_BLOCKS - 1)) {
 2084|      0|			break;
 2085|      0|		}
 2086|      0|		seed_height -= SEEDHASH_EPOCH_BLOCKS;
 2087|      0|	}
 2088|       |
 2089|      0|	for (auto it = m_mainchainByHeight.begin(); it != m_mainchainByHeight.end();) {
 2090|      0|		const uint64_t h = it->first;
 2091|      0|		if (h + PRUNE_DISTANCE >= height) {
 2092|      0|			break;
 2093|      0|		}
 2094|       |
 2095|      0|		if (std::find(seed_heights.begin(), seed_heights.end(), h) == seed_heights.end()) {
 2096|      0|			m_mainchainByHash.erase(it->second.id);
 2097|      0|			it = m_mainchainByHeight.erase(it);
 2098|      0|		}
 2099|      0|		else {
 2100|      0|			++it;
 2101|      0|		}
 2102|      0|	}
 2103|      0|}

 2105|       |void p2pool::api_update_block_found(const ChainMain* data, const PoolBlock* block, bool update_stats_mod)

 2231|      0|{

 2240|      0|		break;

 2253|      0|#endif

 2255|      0|		LOGINFO(1, "caught signal " << signum);

 2264|       |bool init_signals(p2pool* pool, bool init)
 2265|      0|{

 2267|      0|	signal(SIGPIPE, SIG_IGN);
 2268|      0|#endif

 2270|      0|	constexpr int signal_names[] = {
 2271|      0|		SIGHUP,
 2272|      0|		SIGINT,
 2273|      0|		SIGTERM,
 2274|       |#ifdef SIGBREAK
 2275|       |		SIGBREAK,
 2276|       |#endif
 2277|      0|#ifdef SIGUSR1
 2278|      0|		SIGUSR1,
 2279|      0|#endif
 2280|      0|	};
 2281|       |
 2282|      0|	static uv_signal_t signals[array_size(signal_names)];
 2283|       |

 2286|      0|			uv_signal_stop(&signals[i]);
 2287|      0|			uv_close(reinterpret_cast<uv_handle_t*>(&signals[i]), nullptr);
 2288|      0|		}
 2289|      0|		return true;
 2290|      0|	}
 2291|       |
 2292|      0|	for (size_t i = 0; i < array_size(signal_names); ++i) {
 2293|      0|		uv_signal_init(uv_default_loop_checked(), &signals[i]);
 2294|      0|		signals[i].data = pool;
 2295|      0|		const int rc = uv_signal_start(&signals[i], on_signal, signal_names[i]);
 2296|      0|		if (rc != 0) {
 2297|      0|			LOGERR(1, "failed to initialize signal, error " << rc);
 2298|      0|			return false;
 2299|      0|		}
 2300|      0|	}
 2301|       |
 2302|      0|	return true;

  351|       |bool PoolBlock::get_pow_hash(RandomX_Hasher_Base* hasher, uint64_t height, const hash& seed_hash, hash& pow_hash, bool force_light_mode, size_t lane)
  352|      1|{
  353|      1|	if (m_transactions.empty()) {
  354|      0|		LOGERR(1, "Trying to calculate PoW hash of an uninitialized block, fix the code!");
  355|      0|		return false;
  356|      0|	}
  357|       |
  358|       |	// Calculate the coinbase tx hash, then the merkle root of all transactions in the block - this merkle root is what goes into the hashing blob
  359|       |
  360|       |	// Monero transactions are hashed in 3 separate parts, the resulting 3 hashes are then hashed together to get the final result
  361|       |	// For the reference, see "calculate_transaction_hash" in Monero's src/cryptonote_basic/cryptonote_format_utils.cpp
  362|       |
  363|      1|	alignas(8) uint8_t hashes[HASH_SIZE * 3];
  364|       |
  365|       |	// Second hash is keccak of base rct data (it doesn't exist for the coinbase transaction, so it's a hash of a single 0x00 byte)
  366|      1|	memcpy(hashes + HASH_SIZE, keccak_0x00.h, HASH_SIZE);
  367|       |
  368|       |	// Third hash is null because there is no rct data in the coinbase transaction
  369|      1|	memset(hashes + HASH_SIZE * 2, 0, HASH_SIZE);
  370|       |
  371|      1|	uint64_t count;
  372|       |
  373|      1|	uint8_t blob[HASHING_BLOB_MAX_SIZE];
  374|      1|	size_t blob_size = 0;
  375|       |
  376|      1|	{
  377|      1|		size_t header_size, miner_tx_size;
  378|      1|		const std::vector<uint8_t> mainchain_data = serialize_mainchain_data(&header_size, &miner_tx_size, nullptr, nullptr, nullptr, nullptr);
  379|       |
  380|      1|		if (!header_size || !miner_tx_size || (mainchain_data.size() < header_size + miner_tx_size)) {
  381|      0|			LOGERR(1, "tried to calculate PoW of uninitialized block");
  382|      0|			return false;
  383|      0|		}
  384|       |
  385|      1|		blob_size = header_size;
  386|      1|		memcpy(blob, mainchain_data.data(), blob_size);
  387|       |
  388|      1|		const uint8_t* miner_tx = mainchain_data.data() + header_size;
  389|      1|		hash tmp;
  390|       |
  391|       |		// "miner_tx_size - 1" because the last byte is 0x00 (base rct data), it goes into the second hash
  392|      1|		keccak(miner_tx, static_cast<int>(miner_tx_size) - 1, tmp.h);
  393|      1|		memcpy(hashes, tmp.h, HASH_SIZE);
  394|       |
  395|      1|		count = m_transactions.size();
  396|       |
  397|      1|		keccak(reinterpret_cast<uint8_t*>(hashes), HASH_SIZE * 3, tmp.h);
  398|       |
  399|       |		// Save the coinbase tx hash into the first element of m_transactions
  400|      1|		m_transactions[0] = static_cast<indexed_hash>(tmp);
  401|       |
  402|      1|		root_hash tmp_root;
  403|       |
  404|      1|#ifdef WITH_INDEXED_HASHES
  405|      1|		std::vector<hash> transactions;
  406|      1|		transactions.reserve(m_transactions.size());
  407|       |
  408|     21|		for (const auto& h : m_transactions) {
  409|     21|			transactions.emplace_back(h);
  410|     21|		}
  411|       |
  412|      1|		merkle_hash(transactions, tmp_root);
  413|       |#else
  414|       |		merkle_hash(m_transactions, tmp_root);
  415|       |#endif
  416|       |
  417|      1|		memcpy(blob + blob_size, tmp_root.h, HASH_SIZE);
  418|      1|		blob_size += HASH_SIZE;
  419|      1|	}
  420|       |
  421|      1|	writeVarint(count, [&blob, &blob_size](uint8_t b) { blob[blob_size++] = b; });
  422|       |
  423|       |	// cppcheck-suppress danglingLifetime
  424|      1|	m_hashingBlob.assign(blob, blob + blob_size);
  425|       |
  426|      1|	return hasher->calculate(blob, blob_size, height, seed_hash, pow_hash, force_light_mode, lane);
  427|      1|}

  429|       |uint64_t PoolBlock::get_payout(const Wallet& w) const
  430|      4|{
  431|     58|	for (size_t i = 0, n = m_outputAmounts.size(); i < n; ++i) {
  432|     57|		const TxOutput& out = m_outputAmounts[i];
  433|       |
  434|     57|		hash eph_public_key;
  435|       |

  446|       |hash PoolBlock::calculate_tx_key_seed() const
  447|  3.23k|{
  448|  3.23k|	const char domain[] = "tx_key_seed";
  449|  3.23k|	const uint32_t zero = 0;
  450|       |
  451|  3.23k|	const std::vector<uint8_t> mainchain_data = serialize_mainchain_data(nullptr, nullptr, nullptr, nullptr, &zero, &zero);
  452|  3.23k|	const std::vector<uint8_t> sidechain_data = serialize_sidechain_data();
  453|       |
  454|  3.23k|	hash result;
  455|  31.3M|	keccak_custom([&domain, &mainchain_data, &sidechain_data](int offset) -> uint8_t {
  456|  31.3M|		size_t k = offset;
  457|       |
  458|  31.3M|		if (k < sizeof(domain)) return domain[k];
  459|  31.3M|		k -= sizeof(domain);
  460|       |
  461|  31.3M|		if (k < mainchain_data.size()) return mainchain_data[k];
  462|   731k|		k -= mainchain_data.size();
  463|       |
  464|   731k|		return sidechain_data[k];
  465|  31.3M|	}, static_cast<int>(sizeof(domain) + mainchain_data.size() + sidechain_data.size()), result.h, HASH_SIZE);
  466|       |
  467|  3.23k|	return result;

   41|       |* |                   POOL BLOCK                   |
   42|       |* |------------------------------------------------|
   43|       |* |    Monero block template     | Side-chain data |
   44|       |* |------------------------------|-----------------|
   45|       |* |xxxNONCExxxEXTRA_NONCExHASHxxx|xxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxx|
   46|       |* --------------------------------------------------
   47|       |*
   48|       |* HASH (or Merkle tree root hash) comes in TX_EXTRA_MERGE_MINING_TAG directly after EXTRA_NONCE
   49|       |* HASH is calculated from all pool block's bytes and consensus ID (NONCE, EXTRA_NONCE and HASH itself are replaced with 0's when calculating HASH)
   50|       |* Pool block's PoW hash is calculated from the Monero block template part using Monero's consensus rules
   51|       |*/

   53|       |// 128 KB minus BLOCK_RESPONSE P2P protocol header (5 bytes)
   54|       |static constexpr uint64_t MAX_BLOCK_SIZE = 128 * 1024 - 5;
   55|       |
   56|       |// 0.6 XMR
   57|       |static constexpr uint64_t BASE_BLOCK_REWARD = 600000000000ULL;
   58|       |
   59|       |// Because these values are stored in a 56 bit field
   60|       |static constexpr uint64_t MAX_OUTPUT_VALUE = (1ULL << 56) - 1;
   61|       |

   63|       |static constexpr difficulty_type MAX_CUMULATIVE_DIFFICULTY{ 13019633956666736640ULL, 1710ULL };
   64|       |
   65|       |// 1000 years at 1 block/second. It should be enough for any normal use.

   77|       |

  336|       |static bool randomx_calculate_hash_safe(randomx_vm* machine, const void* input, size_t inputSize, void* output)
  337|      1|{

  347|      0|		}

  353|      1|{

  360|       |
  361|       |	// Collect shares from each block in the PPLNS window, starting from the "tip"

  364|  29.6k|	const PoolBlock* cur = tip;
  365|       |
  366|  29.6k|	difficulty_type mainchain_diff

  368|  29.6k|		= m_testMainChainDiff
  369|  29.6k|#endif
  370|  29.6k|	;

  373|      0|		const uint64_t h = p2pool::get_seed_height(tip->m_txinGenHeight);
  374|      0|		if (!m_pool->get_difficulty_at_height(h, mainchain_diff)) {

  376|      0|			return false;
  377|      0|		}
  378|       |

  380|      0|			<< ", height = " << tip->m_sidechainHeight
  381|      0|			<< ", Monero height = " << tip->m_txinGenHeight

  384|      0|		);
  385|      0|	}
  386|       |
  387|       |	// Dynamic PPLNS window starting from v2
  388|       |	// Limit PPLNS weight to 2x of the Monero difficulty (max 2 blocks per PPLNS window on average)
  389|  29.6k|	const difficulty_type max_pplns_weight = mainchain_diff * 2;
  390|  29.6k|	difficulty_type pplns_weight;
  391|       |
  392|  29.6k|	unordered_set<MinerShare> shares_set;
  393|  29.6k|	shares_set.reserve(m_chainWindowSize * 2);
  394|       |
  395|  27.9M|	do {
  396|  27.9M|		difficulty_type cur_weight = cur->m_difficulty;
  397|       |
  398|  27.9M|		for (const hash& uncle_id : cur->m_uncles) {
  399|   713k|			auto it = m_blocksById.find(uncle_id);
  400|   713k|			if (it == m_blocksById.end()) {
  401|  7.10k|				LOGWARN(L, "get_shares: can't find uncle block at height = " << cur->m_sidechainHeight << ", id = " << uncle_id);

  403|  7.10k|				return false;
  404|  7.10k|			}
  405|       |
  406|   706k|			const PoolBlock* uncle = it->second;
  407|       |
  408|       |			// Skip uncles which are already out of PPLNS window
  409|   706k|			if (tip->m_sidechainHeight - uncle->m_sidechainHeight >= m_chainWindowSize) {
  410|    214|				continue;
  411|    214|			}
  412|       |
  413|       |			// Take some % of uncle's weight into this share
  414|   705k|			const difficulty_type uncle_penalty = uncle->m_difficulty * m_unclePenalty / 100;
  415|   705k|			const difficulty_type uncle_weight = uncle->m_difficulty - uncle_penalty;
  416|   705k|			const difficulty_type new_pplns_weight = pplns_weight + uncle_weight;
  417|       |
  418|       |			// Skip uncles that push PPLNS weight above the limit
  419|   705k|			if (new_pplns_weight > max_pplns_weight) {
  420|    492|				continue;
  421|    492|			}
  422|       |
  423|   705k|			cur_weight += uncle_penalty;
  424|       |
  425|   705k|			auto result = shares_set.emplace(uncle_weight, &uncle->m_minerWallet);
  426|   705k|			if (!result.second) {
  427|   600k|				result.first->m_weight += uncle_weight;
  428|   600k|			}
  429|   705k|			pplns_weight = new_pplns_weight;
  430|   705k|		}
  431|       |
  432|       |		// Always add non-uncle shares even if PPLNS weight goes above the limit
  433|  27.9M|		auto result = shares_set.emplace(cur_weight, &cur->m_minerWallet);
  434|  27.9M|		if (!result.second) {
  435|  22.4M|			result.first->m_weight += cur_weight;
  436|  22.4M|		}
  437|  27.9M|		pplns_weight += cur_weight;
  438|       |
  439|       |		// One non-uncle share can go above the limit, but it will also guarantee that "shares" is never empty
  440|  27.9M|		if (pplns_weight > max_pplns_weight) {
  441|  13.5k|			break;
  442|  13.5k|		}

  444|  27.9M|		++block_depth;
  445|  27.9M|		if (block_depth >= m_chainWindowSize) {
  446|  8.88k|			break;
  447|  8.88k|		}

  449|       |		// Reached the genesis block so we're done
  450|  27.9M|		if (cur->m_sidechainHeight == 0) {
  451|      0|			break;
  452|      0|		}
  453|       |
  454|  27.9M|		auto it = m_blocksById.find(cur->m_parent);
  455|  27.9M|		if (it == m_blocksById.end()) {

  457|    104|			LOGWARN(L, "get_shares: can't calculate shares for block at height = " << tip->m_sidechainHeight << ", id = " << tip->m_sidechainId << ", mainchain height = " << tip->m_txinGenHeight);
  458|    104|			return false;
  459|    104|		}

  462|  27.9M|	} while (true);
  463|       |
  464|  22.4k|	if (bottom_height) {
  465|      0|		*bottom_height = cur->m_sidechainHeight;
  466|      0|	}
  467|       |
  468|  22.4k|	shares.assign(shares_set.begin(), shares_set.end());
  469|  34.3M|	std::sort(shares.begin(), shares.end(), [](const auto& a, const auto& b) { return *a.m_wallet < *b.m_wallet; });
  470|       |
  471|  22.4k|	const uint64_t n = shares.size();
  472|       |
  473|       |	// Shuffle shares
  474|       |
  475|       |	// TODO: on the next hardfork change the shuffle to a better variant that churns only O(1) indices when wallets enter/leave
  476|       |	//
  477|       |	// The idea:
  478|       |	//
  479|       |	// Oldest wallet in the PPLNS window picks its index in [0, N) randomly by
  480|       |	// picking a random number in the [0, next_pow2(N + big enough margin)) range to workaround the changing N.
  481|       |	//
  482|       |	// The deterministic PRNG to be used for this must have uniformly distributed bits for any N consecutive bits it generates.
  483|       |	// Maybe PCG64 (permuted congruential generator) seeded with sha256(wallet keys||m_txkeySecSeed) will be good enough.
  484|       |	//
  485|       |	// The next wallet picks its index also in [0, N) and repeats if it conflicts, and so on.
  486|       |	// Tests have shown that each "wallet set change" churns ~5-6 indices, instead of 34-60% with the current algorithm.
  487|       |	// Fewer indices changed -> faster get_outputs_blob() because it has to do fewer new eph public key calculations.
  488|       |
  489|  22.4k|	if (n > 1) {
  490|  13.4k|		hash h;
  491|  13.4k|		keccak(tip->m_txkeySecSeed.h, HASH_SIZE, h.h);
  492|       |
  493|  13.4k|		uint64_t seed = *h.u64();
  494|  13.4k|		if (seed == 0) seed = 1;
  495|       |
  496|  3.32M|		for (uint64_t i = 0, k; i < n - 1; ++i) {
  497|  3.31M|			seed = xorshift64star(seed);
  498|  3.31M|			umul128(seed, n - i, &k);
  499|  3.31M|			std::swap(shares[i], shares[i + k]);
  500|  3.31M|		}
  501|  13.4k|	}
  502|       |
  503|  22.4k|	LOGINFO(6, "get_shares: parent = " << tip->m_parent << ", " << n << " unique wallets in PPLNS window, PPLNS weight = " << pplns_weight);
  504|  22.4k|	return true;

  704|       |bool SideChain::add_block(const PoolBlock& block)
  705|  33.5k|{
  706|  33.5k|	LOGINFO(3, "add_block: height = " << block.m_sidechainHeight <<
  707|  33.5k|		", id = " << block.m_sidechainId <<
  708|  33.5k|		", mainchain height = " << block.m_txinGenHeight <<
  709|  33.5k|		", verified = " << (block.m_verified ? 1 : 0)
  710|  33.5k|	);
  711|       |
  712|  33.5k|	PoolBlock* new_block = new PoolBlock(block);

  856|       |bool SideChain::get_outputs_blob(PoolBlock* block, uint64_t total_reward, std::vector<uint8_t>& blob) const
  857|     12|{
  858|     12|	blob.clear();
  859|       |
  860|     12|	hash txkeySec;
  861|       |
  862|     12|	std::vector<uint64_t> tmpRewards;
  863|     12|	std::vector<MinerShare> tmpShares;
  864|     12|	{
  865|     12|		ReadLock lock(m_sidechainLock);
  866|       |
  867|     12|		auto it = block->m_sidechainId.empty() ? m_blocksById.end() : m_blocksById.find(block->m_sidechainId);
  868|     12|		if (it != m_blocksById.end()) {
  869|     12|			const PoolBlock* b = it->second;
  870|     12|			const size_t n = b->m_outputAmounts.size();
  871|       |
  872|     12|			blob.reserve(n * 39 + 64);
  873|     12|			writeVarint(n, blob);
  874|       |
  875|     12|			uint64_t total_reward_check = 0;
  876|       |
  877|  2.98k|			for (size_t i = 0; i < n; ++i) {
  878|  2.97k|				const PoolBlock::TxOutput& output = b->m_outputAmounts[i];
  879|       |
  880|  2.97k|				total_reward_check += output.m_reward;
  881|       |
  882|  2.97k|				writeVarint(output.m_reward, blob);
  883|  2.97k|				blob.emplace_back(TXOUT_TO_TAGGED_KEY);
  884|  2.97k|				const hash h = b->m_ephPublicKeys[i];
  885|  2.97k|				blob.insert(blob.end(), h.h, h.h + HASH_SIZE);
  886|  2.97k|				blob.emplace_back(static_cast<uint8_t>(output.m_viewTag));
  887|  2.97k|			}
  888|       |
  889|     12|			block->m_ephPublicKeys = b->m_ephPublicKeys;
  890|     12|			block->m_outputAmounts = b->m_outputAmounts;
  891|       |
  892|     12|			return total_reward_check == total_reward;
  893|     12|		}
  894|       |
  895|      0|		txkeySec = block->m_txkeySec;
  896|       |
  897|      0|		if (!get_shares(block, tmpShares) || !split_reward(total_reward, tmpShares, tmpRewards) || (tmpRewards.size() != tmpShares.size())) {
  898|      0|			return false;
  899|      0|		}
  900|      0|	}
  901|       |
  902|      0|	const size_t n = tmpShares.size();
  903|       |
  904|      0|	LOGINFO(6, "get_outputs_blob batch start");

  906|      0|	std::vector<std::pair<hash, size_t>> in;
  907|      0|	std::vector<std::pair<hash, int32_t>> out;
  908|       |

  910|      0|	for (size_t i = 0; i < n; ++i) {
  911|      0|		in.emplace_back(tmpShares[i].m_wallet->view_public_key(), i);
  912|      0|	}
  913|       |
  914|      0|	if (!batch_derivations(in, txkeySec, out)) {
  915|      0|		for (size_t i = 0; i < n; ++i) {
  916|      0|			if (out[i].second < 0) {
  917|      0|				LOGWARN(6, "batch_derivations failed at index " << i);
  918|      0|			}
  919|      0|		}
  920|      0|		return false;
  921|      0|	}
  922|       |
  923|      0|	LOGINFO(6, "get_outputs_blob batch, stage 2 start");
  924|       |
  925|      0|	std::vector<batch_public_key_input> in2;
  926|      0|	std::vector<std::pair<hash, bool>> out2;
  927|       |

  930|      0|		in2.emplace_back(out[i].first, i, tmpShares[i].m_wallet->spend_public_key());
  931|      0|	}
  932|       |
  933|      0|	if (!batch_public_keys(in2, out2)) {
  934|      0|		for (size_t i = 0; i < n; ++i) {
  935|      0|			if (!out2[i].second) {
  936|      0|				LOGWARN(6, "batch_public_keys failed at index " << i);
  937|      0|			}
  938|      0|		}
  939|      0|		return false;
  940|      0|	}
  941|       |

  944|      0|	blob.reserve(n * 39 + 64);
  945|       |
  946|      0|	writeVarint(n, blob);

  951|      0|	block->m_ephPublicKeys.reserve(n);
  952|      0|	block->m_outputAmounts.reserve(n);
  953|       |

  955|      0|		writeVarint(tmpRewards[i], blob);

  969|      0|	block->m_ephPublicKeys.shrink_to_fit();
  970|      0|	block->m_outputAmounts.shrink_to_fit();

  974|       |void SideChain::print_status(bool obtain_sidechain_lock) const
  975|      0|{
  976|      0|	unordered_set<hash> blocks_in_window;
  977|      0|	blocks_in_window.reserve(m_chainWindowSize * 9 / 8);
  978|       |
  979|      0|	const difficulty_type diff = difficulty();
  980|       |
  981|      0|	if (obtain_sidechain_lock) uv_rwlock_rdlock(&m_sidechainLock);
  982|      0|	ON_SCOPE_LEAVE([this, obtain_sidechain_lock]() { if (obtain_sidechain_lock) uv_rwlock_rdunlock(&m_sidechainLock); });
  983|       |
  984|      0|	const uint64_t pool_hashrate = (diff / m_targetBlockTime).lo;
  985|       |
  986|      0|	const difficulty_type network_diff = m_pool->miner_data().difficulty;
  987|      0|	const uint64_t network_hashrate = (network_diff / MONERO_BLOCK_TIME).lo;
  988|       |
  989|      0|	const PoolBlock* tip = m_chainTip;
  990|       |
  991|      0|	std::vector<MinerShare> shares;
  992|      0|	uint64_t bh = 0;
  993|      0|	if (tip) {
  994|      0|		if (!get_shares(tip, shares, &bh, true)) {
  995|      0|			LOGERR(6, "print_status: get_shares failed");
  996|      0|		}
  997|      0|	}
  998|       |
  999|      0|	const uint64_t window_size = (tip && bh) ? (tip->m_sidechainHeight - bh + 1U) : m_chainWindowSize;
 1000|       |
 1001|      0|	uint64_t block_depth = 0;
 1002|      0|	const PoolBlock* cur = tip;
 1003|      0|	const uint64_t tip_height = tip ? tip->m_sidechainHeight : 0;
 1004|       |
 1005|      0|	uint64_t total_blocks_in_window = 0;
 1006|      0|	uint64_t total_uncles_in_window = 0;
 1007|       |
 1008|       |	// each dot corresponds to window_size / 30 shares, with current values, 2160 / 30 = 72
 1009|      0|	constexpr size_t N = 30;
 1010|      0|	std::array<uint64_t, N> our_blocks_in_window{};
 1011|      0|	std::array<uint64_t, N> our_uncles_in_window{};

 1013|      0|	const Wallet& w = m_pool->params().m_miningWallet;
 1014|       |
 1015|      0|	while (cur) {
 1016|      0|		blocks_in_window.emplace(cur->m_sidechainId);
 1017|      0|		++total_blocks_in_window;
 1018|       |
 1019|       |		// "block_depth <= window_size - 1" here (see the check below), so window_index will be <= N - 1
 1020|       |		// This will map the range [0, window_size - 1] into [0, N - 1]
 1021|      0|		const size_t window_index = (window_size > 1) ? (block_depth * (N - 1) / (window_size - 1)) : 0;
 1022|       |
 1023|      0|		if (cur->m_minerWallet == w) {
 1024|      0|			++our_blocks_in_window[window_index];
 1025|      0|		}

 1027|      0|		++block_depth;
 1028|      0|		if (block_depth >= window_size) {
 1029|      0|			break;
 1030|      0|		}

 1035|      0|			if (it != m_blocksById.end()) {
 1036|      0|				const PoolBlock* uncle = it->second;

 1038|      0|					++total_uncles_in_window;

 1040|      0|						++our_uncles_in_window[window_index];
 1041|      0|					}
 1042|      0|				}
 1043|      0|			}
 1044|      0|		}
 1045|       |
 1046|      0|		cur = get_parent(cur);
 1047|      0|	}
 1048|       |

 1269|       |bool SideChain::split_reward(uint64_t reward, const std::vector<MinerShare>& shares, std::vector<uint64_t>& rewards)

 1406|  33.4M|		}

 1631|       |	// Having so many blocks on top of this one means it was verified by the network at some point

 1634|       |	// Blocks in PPLNS window (m_chainWindowSize = W) require up to m_chainWindowSize earlier blocks to verify
 1635|       |	// Each block at depth N can also have uncle blocks at depths from N + 1 up to N + UNCLE_BLOCK_DEPTH (U)

 1637|       |	// If a block is deeper than "2*W-1" it can't influence blocks in PPLNS window:

 2205|       |		// Handle a degenerate case

 2208|      0|		}

 2731|       |void SideChain::finish_precalc()
 2732|  2.15k|{
 2733|  2.15k|	if (m_precalcFinished.exchange(true)) {
 2734|  2.14k|		return;
 2735|  2.14k|	}
 2736|       |
 2737|     10|	try
 2738|     10|	{

 2741|     10|			m_precalcJobs.clear();
 2742|     10|			m_precalcJobs.shrink_to_fit();
 2743|     10|			uv_cond_broadcast(&m_precalcJobsCond);
 2744|     10|		}
 2745|       |

 2747|     10|			t.join();
 2748|     10|		}
 2749|     10|		m_precalcWorkers.clear();
 2750|     10|		m_precalcWorkers.shrink_to_fit();
 2751|       |
 2752|     10|		delete m_uniquePrecalcInputs;

 2754|       |
 2755|     10|		uv_mutex_destroy(&m_precalcJobsMutex);
 2756|     10|		uv_cond_destroy(&m_precalcJobsCond);
 2757|       |
 2758|       |		// Also clear cache because it has data from all old blocks now
 2759|     10|		clear_crypto_cache();
 2760|       |
 2761|     10|		LOGINFO(4, "pre-calculation workers stopped");

   33|       |struct MinerShare
   34|       |{

   36|       |

   38|       |

   40|       |	const Wallet* m_wallet;
   41|       |};
   42|       |
   43|       |class SideChain : public nocopy_nomove
   44|       |{
   45|       |public:

  203|       |static bool get_custom_user(const char* s, char (&user)[N])
  204|      0|{
  205|      0|	size_t len = 0;

  214|      0|			break;

  217|      0|		if (c >= ' ' && c <= '~' && c != ',' && c != '"' && c != '\\') {
  218|      0|			user[len++] = c;

  220|      0|		++s;

  255|       |bool StratumServer::on_login(StratumClient* client, uint32_t id, const char* login)

  357|       |bool StratumServer::on_submit(StratumClient* client, uint32_t id, const char* job_id_str, const char* nonce_str, const char* result_str)

  366|      0|		}

  368|      0|	}

  372|      0|		return false;
  373|      0|	}

  375|      0|	uint32_t nonce = 0;
  376|       |
  377|      0|	for (int i = static_cast<int>(sizeof(uint32_t)) - 1; i >= 0; --i) {
  378|      0|		uint32_t d[2];
  379|      0|		if (!from_hex(nonce_str[i * 2 + 0], d[0]) || !from_hex(nonce_str[i * 2 + 1], d[1])) {
  380|      0|			LOGWARN(4, "client " << static_cast<char*>(client->m_addrString) << " invalid params ('nonce' is not a hex integer)");
  381|      0|			return false;
  382|      0|		}
  383|      0|		nonce = (nonce << 8) | (d[0] << 4) | d[1];
  384|      0|	}

  392|      0|			return false;
  393|      0|		}
  394|      0|		resultHash.h[i] = static_cast<uint8_t>((d[0] << 4) | d[1]);
  395|      0|	}

  571|       |void StratumServer::show_workers()
  572|      0|{
  573|      0|	check_event_loop_thread(__func__);
  574|       |
  575|      0|	const uint64_t cur_time = seconds_since_epoch();

  578|      0|	int addr_len = 0;

  592|      0|	);

  594|      0|	for (const StratumClient* c = static_cast<StratumClient*>(m_connectedClientsList->m_next); c != m_connectedClientsList; c = static_cast<StratumClient*>(c->m_next)) {

  599|      0|			diff.hi = 0;
  600|      0|			if (r) {
  601|      0|				++diff.lo;
  602|      0|			}
  603|      0|		}

  605|       |#ifdef WITH_TLS
  606|       |		const bool is_tls = !c->m_tls.is_empty();
  607|       |#else
  608|      0|		constexpr bool is_tls = false;
  609|      0|#endif
  610|       |
  611|      0|		char shares_buf[16] = {};
  612|      0|		log::Stream s(shares_buf);
  613|      0|		s << c->m_sidechainShares << '/' << c->m_stratumShares << '\0';

  615|      0|		LOGINFO(0, log::pad_right(static_cast<const char*>(c->m_addrString), addr_len + 8)
  616|      0|				<< (is_tls ? "yes    " : "no     ")

  624|      0|	}

  674|       |
  675|      0|	{
  676|      0|		ReadLock lock(m_hashrateDataLock);
  677|       |
  678|      0|		total_hashes = m_cumulativeHashes;
  679|      0|		hashes_since_last_share = (m_cumulativeHashes > m_cumulativeHashesAtLastShare) ? (m_cumulativeHashes - m_cumulativeHashesAtLastShare) : 0;
  680|       |
  681|      0|		const HashrateData* data = m_hashrateData;
  682|      0|		const HashrateData& head = data[m_hashrateDataHead];
  683|      0|		const HashrateData& tail_15m = data[m_hashrateDataTail_15m];
  684|      0|		const HashrateData& tail_1h = data[m_hashrateDataTail_1h];
  685|      0|		const HashrateData& tail_24h = data[m_hashrateDataTail_24h];
  686|       |
  687|      0|		hashes_15m = head.m_cumulativeHashes - tail_15m.m_cumulativeHashes;
  688|      0|		dt_15m = static_cast<int64_t>(head.m_timestamp - tail_15m.m_timestamp);
  689|       |
  690|      0|		hashes_1h = head.m_cumulativeHashes - tail_1h.m_cumulativeHashes;
  691|      0|		dt_1h = static_cast<int64_t>(head.m_timestamp - tail_1h.m_timestamp);
  692|       |
  693|      0|		hashes_24h = head.m_cumulativeHashes - tail_24h.m_cumulativeHashes;
  694|      0|		dt_24h = static_cast<int64_t>(head.m_timestamp - tail_24h.m_timestamp);
  695|       |
  696|      0|		average_effort = 0.0;
  697|      0|		const double diff = m_cumulativeFoundSharesDiff;
  698|      0|		if (diff > 0.0) {
  699|      0|			average_effort = static_cast<double>(m_cumulativeHashesAtLastShare) * 100.0 / diff;
  700|      0|		}
  701|       |
  702|      0|		sidechain_shares_found = m_totalFoundSidechainShares;
  703|      0|		sidechain_shares_failed = m_totalFailedSidechainShares;
  704|      0|		total_stratum_shares = m_totalStratumShares;
  705|      0|	}
  706|       |
  707|      0|	const uint64_t hashrate_15m = (dt_15m > 0) ? (hashes_15m / dt_15m) : 0;
  708|      0|	const uint64_t hashrate_1h  = (dt_1h  > 0) ? (hashes_1h  / dt_1h ) : 0;
  709|      0|	const uint64_t hashrate_24h = (dt_24h > 0) ? (hashes_24h / dt_24h) : 0;
  710|       |
  711|      0|	char shares_failed_buf[64] = {};
  712|      0|	if (sidechain_shares_failed) {
  713|      0|		log::Stream s(shares_failed_buf);
  714|      0|		s << log::Yellow() << "\nP2Pool shares failed = " << sidechain_shares_failed << log::NoColor();
  715|      0|	}
  716|       |
  717|      0|	LOGINFO(0, "status" <<
  718|      0|		"\nHashrate (15m est)   = " << log::Hashrate(hashrate_15m) <<
  719|      0|		"\nHashrate (1h  est)   = " << log::Hashrate(hashrate_1h) <<
  720|      0|		"\nHashrate (24h est)   = " << log::Hashrate(hashrate_24h) <<
  721|      0|		"\nStratum hashes       = " << total_hashes <<
  722|      0|		"\nStratum shares       = " << total_stratum_shares <<
  723|      0|		"\nP2Pool shares found  = " << sidechain_shares_found << static_cast<const char*>(shares_failed_buf) <<
  724|      0|		"\nAverage effort       = " << average_effort << '%' <<
  725|      0|		"\nCurrent effort       = " << static_cast<double>(hashes_since_last_share) * 100.0 / m_pool->side_chain().difficulty().to_double() << '%' <<
  726|      0|		"\nConnections          = " << m_numConnections.load() << " (" << m_numIncomingConnections.load() << " incoming)"
  727|      0|	);
  728|      0|}
  729|       |
  730|       |// Compresses 64-bit hashes value into 16-bit value (5 bits for shift, 11 bits for data)
  731|       |enum HashValue : uint64_t {
  732|       |	bits = 11,
  733|       |	mask = (1 << bits) - 1,
  734|       |};
  735|       |
  736|       |static constexpr FORCEINLINE uint64_t hash_uncompress(uint64_t h)
  737|      0|{
  738|      0|	return (h & HashValue::mask) << (h >> HashValue::bits);
  739|      0|};
  740|       |
  741|       |enum HashMaxValue : uint64_t {
  742|       |	value = hash_uncompress(std::numeric_limits<uint16_t>::max())
  743|       |};
  744|       |
  745|       |static FORCEINLINE uint16_t hash_compress(uint64_t h)
  746|      0|{
  747|      0|	if (h <= HashValue::mask) {
  748|      0|		return static_cast<uint16_t>(h);
  749|      0|	}
  750|       |
  751|      0|	if (h >= HashMaxValue::value) {
  752|      0|		return std::numeric_limits<uint16_t>::max();
  753|      0|	}
  754|       |
  755|      0|	const uint64_t shift = bsr(h) - (HashValue::bits - 1);
  756|      0|	return static_cast<uint16_t>((shift << HashValue::bits) | (h >> shift));
  757|      0|}
  758|       |
  759|       |void StratumServer::update_auto_diff(StratumClient* client, const uint64_t timestamp, const uint64_t hashes)
  760|      0|{
  761|      0|	const uint16_t hashes_compressed = hash_compress(hashes);
  762|      0|	client->m_autoDiffWindowHashes += hash_uncompress(hashes_compressed);
  763|       |
  764|      0|	const uint32_t k = client->m_autoDiffIndex++;
  765|      0|	constexpr uint32_t N = StratumClient::AUTO_DIFF_SIZE;
  766|       |
  767|      0|	StratumClient::AutoDiffData& auto_diff_data = client->m_autoDiffData[k % N];
  768|       |
  769|      0|	if (k >= N) {
  770|      0|		client->m_autoDiffWindowHashes -= hash_uncompress(auto_diff_data.m_hashes);
  771|      0|	}
  772|       |
  773|      0|	const uint16_t t1 = auto_diff_data.m_timestamp;
  774|      0|	const uint16_t t2 = static_cast<uint16_t>(timestamp);
  775|      0|	auto_diff_data.m_timestamp = t2;
  776|      0|	auto_diff_data.m_hashes = hashes_compressed;
  777|       |
  778|      0|	if (k >= N) {
  779|       |		// Full window
  780|      0|		const uint16_t dt = t2 - t1;
  781|      0|		client->m_autoDiff.lo = std::max<uint64_t>((client->m_autoDiffWindowHashes * AUTO_DIFF_TARGET_TIME) / (dt ? dt : 1), MIN_DIFF);
  782|      0|		client->m_autoDiff.hi = 0;
  783|      0|	}
  784|      0|	else if (k >= 10) {
  785|       |		// Partial window
  786|      0|		const uint64_t h0 = hash_uncompress(client->m_autoDiffData[0].m_hashes);
  787|      0|		const uint16_t dt = client->m_autoDiffData[k].m_timestamp - client->m_autoDiffData[0].m_timestamp;
  788|       |
  789|      0|		client->m_autoDiff.lo = std::max<uint64_t>(((client->m_autoDiffWindowHashes - h0) * AUTO_DIFF_TARGET_TIME) / (dt ? dt : 1), MIN_DIFF);
  790|      0|		client->m_autoDiff.hi = 0;
  791|      0|	}
  792|      0|	else if (k == 0) {
  793|       |		// First share, fix auto diff to current difficulty until we have at least 10 shares
  794|      0|		client->m_autoDiff.lo = hashes;
  795|      0|		client->m_autoDiff.hi = 0;
  796|      0|	}
  797|      0|}
  798|       |
  799|       |void StratumServer::on_blobs_ready()
  800|      0|{
  801|      0|	check_event_loop_thread(__func__);
  802|       |
  803|      0|	const uint64_t cur_time_mcs = microseconds_since_epoch();
  804|      0|	const uint64_t cur_time = cur_time_mcs / 1'000'000;
  805|       |
  806|       |	// Get new blobs if we're not sending anything right now
  807|      0|	std::unique_ptr<BlobsData>& data = m_blobsBeingSent;
  808|       |
  809|      0|	if (!data) {
  810|      0|		MutexLock lock(m_blobsToSendLock);
  811|       |
  812|      0|		data = std::move(m_blobsToSend);
  813|       |
  814|      0|		if (!data) {
  815|      0|			return;
  816|      0|		}
  817|      0|	}
  818|       |
  819|       |	// Take a snapshot of all clients if we just started sending
  820|      0|	std::vector<std::pair<StratumClient*, uint32_t>>& clients = data->m_clients;
  821|       |
  822|      0|	if (clients.empty()) {
  823|      0|		const uint32_t N = num_connections();
  824|      0|		LOGINFO(5, "sending new job to " << N << " clients");
  825|      0|		clients.reserve(N);
  826|       |
  827|      0|		for (StratumClient* client = static_cast<StratumClient*>(m_connectedClientsList->m_next); client != m_connectedClientsList; client = static_cast<StratumClient*>(client->m_next)) {
  828|      0|			clients.emplace_back(client, client->m_resetCounter.load());
  829|      0|		}
  830|      0|	}
  831|       |
  832|       |#ifndef P2POOL_LOG_DISABLE
  833|       |	if (!clients.empty()) {
  834|       |		++data->m_numBatches;
  835|       |	}
  836|       |#endif
  837|       |
  838|      0|	const uint32_t extra_nonce_start = data->m_extraNonceStart;
  839|      0|	uint32_t next_wall_time_check = data->m_numClientsProcessed + 10;
  840|       |
  841|      0|	while (!clients.empty()) {
  842|       |		// Stop after 0.95 ms total run time, continue in the next libuv loop iteration
  843|      0|		if (data->m_numClientsProcessed >= next_wall_time_check) {
  844|      0|			if (microseconds_since_epoch() >= cur_time_mcs + 950) {
  845|      0|				const int err = uv_async_send(&m_blobsAsync);
  846|      0|				if (err) {
  847|      0|					LOGERR(1, "uv_async_send failed, error " << uv_err_name(err));
  848|      0|				}
  849|      0|				else {
  850|       |					// All good, we'll continue soon
  851|      0|					return;
  852|      0|				}
  853|      0|			}
  854|      0|			next_wall_time_check = data->m_numClientsProcessed + 10;
  855|      0|		}
  856|       |
  857|      0|		StratumClient* client = clients.back().first;
  858|      0|		const uint32_t expected_reset_counter = clients.back().second;
  859|      0|		clients.pop_back();
  860|       |
  861|      0|		++data->m_numClientsProcessed;
  862|       |
  863|      0|		if (client->is_gone(expected_reset_counter)) {
  864|      0|			continue;
  865|      0|		}
  866|       |
  867|      0|		if (!client->m_rpcId) {
  868|       |			// Not logged in yet, on_login() will send the job to this client. Also close inactive connections.
  869|      0|			if (cur_time >= client->m_connectedTime + 10) {
  870|      0|				LOGWARN(4, "client " << static_cast<char*>(client->m_addrString) << " didn't send login data");
  871|      0|				client->ban(m_banTime);
  872|      0|				client->close();
  873|      0|			}
  874|      0|			continue;
  875|      0|		}
  876|       |
  877|      0|		if (data->m_numSent >= data->m_numClientsExpected) {
  878|       |			// We don't have any more extra_nonce values available
  879|      0|			continue;
  880|      0|		}
  881|       |
  882|      0|		uint8_t* hashing_blob = data->m_blobs.data() + data->m_numSent * data->m_blobSize;
  883|       |
  884|      0|		uint64_t target = data->m_target;
  885|      0|		if (client->m_customDiff.lo) {
  886|      0|			target = std::max(target, client->m_customDiff.target());
  887|      0|		}
  888|      0|		else if (m_autoDiff) {
  889|       |			// Limit autodiff to 4000000 for maximum compatibility
  890|      0|			target = std::max(target, TARGET_4_BYTES_LIMIT);
  891|       |
  892|      0|			if (client->m_autoDiff.lo) {
  893|      0|				const uint32_t k = client->m_autoDiffIndex;
  894|      0|				const uint16_t elapsed_time = static_cast<uint16_t>(cur_time) - client->m_autoDiffData[(k - 1) % StratumClient::AUTO_DIFF_SIZE].m_timestamp;
  895|      0|				if (elapsed_time > AUTO_DIFF_TARGET_TIME * 5) {
  896|       |					// More than 500% effort, reduce the auto diff by 1/8 every time until the share is found
  897|      0|					client->m_autoDiff.lo = std::max<uint64_t>(client->m_autoDiff.lo - client->m_autoDiff.lo / 8, MIN_DIFF);
  898|      0|				}
  899|      0|				target = std::max(target, client->m_autoDiff.target());
  900|      0|			}
  901|      0|			else {
  902|       |				// Not enough shares from the client yet, start with 500k diff and cut diff in half every 16 seconds
  903|      0|				target = std::max(target, AUTODIFF_START);
  904|       |
  905|      0|				const uint64_t num_halvings = (cur_time - client->m_connectedTime) / 16;
  906|      0|				for (uint64_t i = 0; (i < num_halvings) && (target < MAX_TARGET); ++i) {
  907|      0|					target *= 2;
  908|      0|				}
  909|      0|			}
  910|      0|		}
  911|       |
  912|      0|		target = std::min(target, MAX_TARGET);
  913|       |
  914|      0|		uint32_t job_id;
  915|      0|		{
  916|      0|			job_id = ++client->m_perConnectionJobId;
  917|       |
  918|      0|			StratumClient::SavedJob& saved_job = client->m_jobs[job_id % StratumClient::JOBS_SIZE];
  919|      0|			saved_job.job_id = job_id;
  920|      0|			saved_job.extra_nonce = extra_nonce_start + data->m_numSent;
  921|      0|			saved_job.template_id = data->m_templateId;
  922|      0|			saved_job.target = target;
  923|      0|		}
  924|      0|		client->m_lastJobTarget = target;
  925|       |
  926|      0|		const size_t blobSize = data->m_blobSize;
  927|      0|		const uint64_t height = data->m_height;
  928|      0|		const hash seedHash = data->m_seedHash;
  929|       |
  930|      0|		const bool result = send(client,
  931|      0|			[blobSize, height, &seedHash, target, hashing_blob, job_id](uint8_t* buf, size_t buf_size)
  932|      0|			{
  933|      0|				log::hex_buf target_hex(&target);
  934|       |
  935|      0|				if (target >= TARGET_4_BYTES_LIMIT) {
  936|      0|					target_hex.m_data += sizeof(uint32_t);
  937|      0|					target_hex.m_size -= sizeof(uint32_t);
  938|      0|				}
  939|       |
  940|      0|				log::Stream s(buf, buf_size);
  941|      0|				s << "{\"jsonrpc\":\"2.0\",\"method\":\"job\",\"params\":{\"blob\":\"";
  942|      0|				s << log::hex_buf(hashing_blob, blobSize) << "\",\"job_id\":\"";
  943|      0|				s << log::Hex(job_id) << "\",\"target\":\"";
  944|      0|				s << target_hex << "\",\"algo\":\"rx/0\",\"height\":";
  945|      0|				s << height << ",\"seed_hash\":\"";
  946|      0|				s << seedHash << "\"}}\n";
  947|      0|				return s.m_pos;
  948|      0|			});
  949|       |
  950|      0|		if (result) {
  951|      0|			++data->m_numSent;
  952|      0|		}
  953|      0|		else {
  954|      0|			client->close();
  955|      0|		}
  956|      0|	}
  957|       |
  958|       |#ifndef P2POOL_LOG_DISABLE
  959|       |	const uint32_t numClientsProcessed = data->m_numClientsProcessed;
  960|       |	const uint32_t numSent = data->m_numSent;
  961|       |	const uint32_t numBatches = data->m_numBatches;
  962|       |
  963|       |	LOGINFO(3, "sent new job to " << numSent << '/' << numClientsProcessed << " clients in " << numBatches << " batches");
  964|       |#endif
  965|       |
  966|       |	// Get the next job to send, if any
  967|       |	// We could call on_blobs_ready() recursively here,
  968|       |	// and it would've been faster, but it's prone to unlimited recursion
  969|       |
  970|      0|	MutexLock lock(m_blobsToSendLock);
  971|       |
  972|      0|	data = std::move(m_blobsToSend);
  973|       |
  974|      0|	if (data) {
  975|      0|		const int err = uv_async_send(&m_blobsAsync);
  976|      0|		if (err) {
  977|      0|			LOGERR(1, "uv_async_send failed, error " << uv_err_name(err));
  978|      0|		}
  979|      0|	}
  980|      0|}
  981|       |
  982|       |void StratumServer::update_hashrate_data(uint64_t hashes, uint64_t timestamp)
  983|      0|{
  984|      0|	constexpr size_t N = array_size(&StratumServer::m_hashrateData);
  985|       |
  986|      0|	WriteLock lock(m_hashrateDataLock);
  987|       |
  988|      0|	if (hashes) {
  989|      0|		m_cumulativeHashes += hashes;
  990|      0|		++m_totalStratumShares;
  991|       |
  992|       |		// P2Pool-nano warning
  993|       |#ifndef P2POOL_LOG_DISABLE
  994|       |		// Check the hashrate when enough shares is found
  995|       |		if (((m_totalStratumShares & 63) == 0) && m_pool->side_chain().is_nano()) {
  996|       |			const HashrateData& head = m_hashrateData[m_hashrateDataHead];
  997|       |			const HashrateData& tail = m_hashrateData[m_hashrateDataTail_24h];
  998|       |
  999|       |			const int64_t dt = static_cast<int64_t>(head.m_timestamp - tail.m_timestamp);
 1000|       |
 1001|       |			if (dt > 0) {
 1002|       |				const uint64_t total_hashes = head.m_cumulativeHashes - tail.m_cumulativeHashes;
 1003|       |				const uint64_t hashrate = total_hashes / dt;
 1004|       |
 1005|       |				if (hashrate > 30000) {
 1006|       |					LOGINFO(0, log::LightRed() << "Your hashrate is " << log::Hashrate(hashrate) << ". Please switch from P2Pool-nano to P2Pool-mini or P2Pool-main. P2Pool-nano is recommended only for small-scale miners.");
 1007|       |				}
 1008|       |			}
 1009|       |		}
 1010|       |#endif // P2POOL_LOG_DISABLE
 1011|      0|	}
 1012|       |
 1013|      0|	HashrateData* data = m_hashrateData;
 1014|      0|	HashrateData& head = data[m_hashrateDataHead];
 1015|      0|	if (head.m_timestamp == timestamp) {
 1016|      0|		head.m_cumulativeHashes = m_cumulativeHashes;
 1017|      0|	}
 1018|      0|	else {
 1019|      0|		m_hashrateDataHead = (m_hashrateDataHead + 1) % N;
 1020|      0|		data[m_hashrateDataHead] = { timestamp, m_cumulativeHashes };
 1021|      0|	}
 1022|       |
 1023|      0|	while (data[m_hashrateDataTail_15m].m_timestamp + 15ul * 60ul < timestamp) {
 1024|      0|		m_hashrateDataTail_15m = (m_hashrateDataTail_15m + 1) % N;
 1025|      0|	}
 1026|       |
 1027|      0|	while (data[m_hashrateDataTail_1h].m_timestamp + 60ul * 60ul < timestamp) {
 1028|      0|		m_hashrateDataTail_1h = (m_hashrateDataTail_1h + 1) % N;
 1029|      0|	}
 1030|       |
 1031|      0|	while (data[m_hashrateDataTail_24h].m_timestamp + 60ul * 60ul * 24ul < timestamp) {
 1032|      0|		m_hashrateDataTail_24h = (m_hashrateDataTail_24h + 1) % N;
 1033|      0|	}
 1034|      0|}
 1035|       |
 1036|       |void StratumServer::on_share_found(uv_work_t* req)
 1037|      0|{
 1038|      0|	SubmittedShare* share = reinterpret_cast<SubmittedShare*>(req->data);
 1039|      0|	StratumServer* server = share->m_server;
 1040|       |
 1041|      0|	if (share->m_allocated) {
 1042|      0|		BACKGROUND_JOB_START(StratumServer::on_share_found);
 1043|      0|	}
 1044|       |
 1045|      0|	if (server->is_banned(share->m_clientIPv6, share->m_clientAddr)) {
 1046|      0|		share->m_highEnoughDifficulty = false;
 1047|      0|		share->m_result = SubmittedShare::Result::BANNED;
 1048|      0|		return;
 1049|      0|	}
 1050|       |
 1051|      0|	p2pool* pool = server->m_pool;
 1052|       |
 1053|      0|	const uint64_t target = share->m_target;
 1054|      0|	const uint64_t hashes = share->m_hashes;
 1055|       |
 1056|      0|	bool submit_failed = false;
 1057|       |
 1058|      0|	if (share->m_highEnoughDifficulty || server->m_enableFullValidation) {
 1059|      0|		if (pool->stopped()) {
 1060|      0|			LOGWARN(0, "p2pool is shutting down, but a share was found. Trying to process it anyway!");
 1061|      0|		}
 1062|       |
 1063|      0|		uint8_t blob[HASHING_BLOB_MAX_SIZE];
 1064|      0|		uint64_t height;
 1065|      0|		difficulty_type difficulty;
 1066|      0|		difficulty_type aux_diff;
 1067|      0|		difficulty_type sidechain_difficulty;
 1068|      0|		hash seed_hash;
 1069|      0|		size_t nonce_offset;
 1070|       |
 1071|      0|		const uint32_t blob_size = pool->block_template().get_hashing_blob(share->m_templateId, share->m_extraNonce, blob, height, difficulty, aux_diff, sidechain_difficulty, seed_hash, nonce_offset);
 1072|      0|		if (!blob_size) {
 1073|      0|			LOGWARN(4, "client " << static_cast<char*>(share->m_clientAddrString) << " got a stale share");
 1074|      0|			share->m_result = SubmittedShare::Result::STALE;
 1075|      0|			return;
 1076|      0|		}
 1077|       |
 1078|      0|		for (uint32_t i = 0, nonce = share->m_nonce; i < sizeof(share->m_nonce); ++i) {
 1079|      0|			blob[nonce_offset + i] = nonce & 255;
 1080|      0|			nonce >>= 8;
 1081|      0|		}
 1082|       |

 1086|      0|			share->m_result = SubmittedShare::Result::COULDNT_CHECK_POW;
 1087|      0|			return;
 1088|      0|		}
 1089|       |
 1090|      0|		if (pow_hash != share->m_resultHash) {
 1091|      0|			bool invalid_pow = true;
 1092|       |
 1093|       |			// Calculate the same hash second time to check if it's an unstable hardware that caused this
 1094|      0|			hash pow_hash2;

 1115|       |
 1116|      0|				return;
 1117|      0|			}
 1118|      0|		}

 1132|       |
 1133|      0|				prevCumulativeHashesAtLastShare = server->m_cumulativeHashesAtLastShare;

 1138|       |
 1139|      0|				prev_time = server->m_lastSidechainShareFoundTime;
 1140|      0|				server->m_lastSidechainShareFoundTime = cur_time;
 1141|      0|			}
 1142|       |

 1147|       |

 1153|      0|					++server->m_totalFailedSidechainShares;
 1154|      0|					server->m_lastSidechainShareFoundTime = prev_time;
 1155|      0|				}
 1156|      0|			}
 1157|      0|		}
 1158|      0|	}
 1159|       |

 1163|      0|	if (LIKELY(value < target)) {

 1168|      0|	}

 1368|       |bool StratumServer::StratumClient::on_read(const char* data, uint32_t size)
 1369|      0|{
 1370|       |#ifdef WITH_TLS
 1371|       |	if (!m_tlsChecked) {
 1372|       |		if (data[0] == 0x16) {
 1373|       |			if (!m_tls.init()) {
 1374|       |				LOGWARN(5, "client " << static_cast<const char*>(m_addrString) << ": TLS init failed");
 1375|       |				return false;
 1376|       |			}
 1377|       |			LOGINFO(5, "client " << log::Gray() << static_cast<const char*>(m_addrString) << log::NoColor() << " is using TLS");
 1378|       |		}
 1379|       |		m_tlsChecked = true;
 1380|       |	}
 1381|       |#endif
 1382|       |
 1383|      0|	auto on_parse = [this](const char* data, uint32_t size) {
 1384|      0|		if (static_cast<size_t>(m_stratumReadBufBytes) + size > STRATUM_BUF_SIZE) {
 1385|      0|			LOGWARN(4, "client " << static_cast<const char*>(m_addrString) << " sent too long Stratum message");
 1386|      0|			ban(static_cast<StratumServer*>(m_owner)->m_banTime);
 1387|      0|			return false;
 1388|      0|		}
 1389|       |
 1390|      0|		memcpy(m_stratumReadBuf + m_stratumReadBufBytes, data, size);
 1391|      0|		m_stratumReadBufBytes += size;
 1392|       |
 1393|      0|		char* line_start = m_stratumReadBuf;
 1394|      0|		const char* e = line_start + m_stratumReadBufBytes;
 1395|      0|		for (char *c = line_start + m_stratumReadBufBytes - size; c < e; ++c) {
 1396|      0|			if (*c == '\n') {
 1397|       |				// Check if the line starts with "GET " or "HEAD" (an HTTP request)
 1398|      0|				if (static_cast<StratumServer*>(m_owner)->http_enabled() && (c - line_start >= 4)) {
 1399|      0|					const uint32_t line_start_data = read_unaligned(reinterpret_cast<uint32_t*>(line_start));
 1400|       |
 1401|      0|					const bool is_http_get  = (line_start_data == 0x20544547U);
 1402|      0|					const bool is_http_head = (line_start_data == 0x44414548U);
 1403|       |
 1404|      0|					if (is_http_get || is_http_head) {
 1405|      0|						LOGINFO(5, "client " << log::Gray() << static_cast<const char*>(m_addrString) << log::NoColor() << " sent an HTTP " << (is_http_get ? "GET" : "HEAD") << " request");
 1406|      0|						send_http_response(is_http_get);
 1407|      0|						close();
 1408|      0|						return true;
 1409|      0|					}
 1410|      0|				}
 1411|       |
 1412|      0|				*c = '\0';
 1413|      0|				if (!process_request(line_start, static_cast<uint32_t>(c - line_start))) {
 1414|      0|					ban(static_cast<StratumServer*>(m_owner)->m_banTime);
 1415|      0|					return false;
 1416|      0|				}
 1417|       |
 1418|      0|				line_start = c + 1;
 1419|      0|			}
 1420|      0|		}
 1421|       |
 1422|       |		// Move the possible unfinished line to the beginning of m_stratumReadBuf to free up more space for reading
 1423|      0|		if (line_start != m_stratumReadBuf) {
 1424|      0|			m_stratumReadBufBytes = static_cast<uint32_t>(m_stratumReadBuf + m_stratumReadBufBytes - line_start);
 1425|      0|			if (m_stratumReadBufBytes > 0) {
 1426|      0|				memmove(m_stratumReadBuf, line_start, m_stratumReadBufBytes);
 1427|      0|			}
 1428|      0|		}
 1429|       |
 1430|      0|		return true;
 1431|      0|	};
 1432|       |
 1433|       |#ifdef WITH_TLS
 1434|       |	if (!m_tls.is_empty()) {
 1435|       |		auto on_write = [this](const uint8_t* data, size_t size) {
 1436|       |			return m_owner->send(this, [data, size](uint8_t* buf, size_t buf_size) -> size_t {
 1437|       |				if (buf_size < size) {
 1438|       |					return 0;
 1439|       |				}
 1440|       |				memcpy(buf, data, size);
 1441|       |				return size;
 1442|       |			}, true);
 1443|       |		};
 1444|       |

 1446|       |	}
 1447|       |#endif
 1448|       |
 1449|      0|	return on_parse(data, size);
 1450|      0|}

 1452|       |bool StratumServer::StratumClient::process_request(char* data, uint32_t /*size*/)
 1453|      0|{
 1454|      0|	StratumServer* server = static_cast<StratumServer*>(m_owner);
 1455|       |
 1456|      0|	using namespace rapidjson;
 1457|       |
 1458|      0|	MemoryPoolAllocator<> valueAlloc(server->m_jsonParseValueBuf, sizeof(server->m_jsonParseValueBuf));
 1459|      0|	MemoryPoolAllocator<> stackAlloc(server->m_jsonParseStackBuf, sizeof(server->m_jsonParseStackBuf));
 1460|       |
 1461|       |	// "/ 2" on the second parameter because it's an initial reservation, not the full stack buf size
 1462|      0|	GenericDocument<UTF8<>, MemoryPoolAllocator<>, MemoryPoolAllocator<>> doc(&valueAlloc, sizeof(server->m_jsonParseStackBuf) / 2, &stackAlloc);
 1463|       |
 1464|      0|	if (doc.ParseInsitu(data).HasParseError()) {
 1465|      0|		LOGWARN(4, "client " << static_cast<char*>(m_addrString) << " invalid JSON request (parse error)");
 1466|      0|		return false;
 1467|      0|	}
 1468|       |
 1469|      0|	if (!doc.IsObject()) {
 1470|      0|		LOGWARN(4, "client " << static_cast<char*>(m_addrString) << " invalid JSON request (not an object)");
 1471|      0|		return false;
 1472|      0|	}
 1473|       |
 1474|      0|	const auto id_it = doc.FindMember("id");
 1475|      0|	if (id_it == doc.MemberEnd()) {
 1476|      0|		LOGWARN(4, "client " << static_cast<char*>(m_addrString) << " invalid JSON request ('id' field not found)");
 1477|      0|		return false;
 1478|      0|	}
 1479|       |
 1480|      0|	const auto& id = id_it->value;
 1481|      0|	if (!id.IsUint()) {
 1482|      0|		LOGWARN(4, "client " << static_cast<char*>(m_addrString) << " invalid JSON request ('id' field is not an integer)");
 1483|      0|		return false;
 1484|      0|	}
 1485|       |
 1486|      0|	const auto method_it = doc.FindMember("method");
 1487|      0|	if (method_it == doc.MemberEnd()) {
 1488|      0|		LOGWARN(4, "client " << static_cast<char*>(m_addrString) << " invalid JSON request ('method' field not found)");
 1489|      0|		return false;
 1490|      0|	}
 1491|       |
 1492|      0|	const auto& method = method_it->value;
 1493|      0|	if (!method.IsString()) {
 1494|      0|		LOGWARN(4, "client " << static_cast<char*>(m_addrString) << " invalid JSON request ('method' field is not a string)");
 1495|      0|		return false;
 1496|      0|	}
 1497|       |

 1643|       |void StratumServer::api_update_local_stats(uint64_t timestamp)
 1644|      0|{
 1645|      0|	if (!m_pool->api() || !m_pool->params().m_localStats || m_pool->stopped()) {
 1646|      0|		return;
 1647|      0|	}
 1648|       |
 1649|       |	// Rate limit to no more than once in 20 seconds.
 1650|      0|	uint64_t t = m_apiLastUpdateTime.load();

 1652|      0|		return;
 1653|      0|	}
 1654|       |
 1655|      0|	if (!m_apiLastUpdateTime.compare_exchange_strong(t, timestamp)) {
 1656|      0|		return;
 1657|      0|	}

 1672|      0|		hashes_since_last_share = (m_cumulativeHashes > m_cumulativeHashesAtLastShare) ? (m_cumulativeHashes - m_cumulativeHashesAtLastShare) : 0;

 1678|      0|		const HashrateData& tail_24h = data[m_hashrateDataTail_24h];

 1680|      0|		hashes_15m = head.m_cumulativeHashes - tail_15m.m_cumulativeHashes;
 1681|      0|		dt_15m = static_cast<int64_t>(head.m_timestamp - tail_15m.m_timestamp);
 1682|       |
 1683|      0|		hashes_1h = head.m_cumulativeHashes - tail_1h.m_cumulativeHashes;
 1684|      0|		dt_1h = static_cast<int64_t>(head.m_timestamp - tail_1h.m_timestamp);
 1685|       |

 1698|      0|		total_stratum_shares = m_totalStratumShares;
 1699|      0|	}

 1703|      0|	const uint64_t hashrate_24h = (dt_24h > 0) ? (hashes_24h / dt_24h) : 0;

 1711|       |

  555|       |void TCPServer::ban(bool is_v6, raw_ip ip, uint64_t seconds)
  556|      0|{
  557|      0|	if (ip.is_localhost()) {
  558|      0|		return;
  559|      0|	}

  561|       |	// If it's IPv6, ban the whole /64 prefix
  562|      0|	if (is_v6 && !ip.is_ipv4_prefix()) {
  563|      0|		memset(ip.data + 8, 0, sizeof(ip.data) - 8);
  564|      0|	}

  567|       |
  568|      0|	MutexLock lock(m_bansLock);
  569|      0|	m_bans[ip] = ban_time;
  570|      0|}
  571|       |
  572|       |void TCPServer::print_bans()
  573|      0|{
  574|      0|	using namespace std::chrono;
  575|      0|	const auto cur_time = steady_clock::now();
  576|       |
  577|      0|	MutexLock lock(m_bansLock);
  578|       |
  579|      0|	for (auto it = m_bans.begin(); it != m_bans.end();) {
  580|      0|		if (cur_time < it->second) {
  581|      0|			const uint64_t t = duration_cast<seconds>(it->second - cur_time).count();
  582|      0|			LOGINFO(0, it->first << " is banned (" << t << " seconds left)");
  583|      0|			++it;
  584|      0|		}
  585|      0|		else {
  586|      0|			it = m_bans.erase(it);
  587|      0|		}
  588|      0|	}
  589|      0|}
  590|       |
  591|       |bool TCPServer::send_internal(Client* client, const Callback<size_t, uint8_t*, size_t>::Base& callback, bool raw)
  592|      0|{
  593|      0|	check_event_loop_thread(__func__);
  594|       |
  595|      0|	if (client->m_isClosing) {
  596|      0|		LOGWARN(5, "client " << static_cast<const char*>(client->m_addrString) << " is being disconnected, can't send any more data");
  597|      0|		return true;
  598|      0|	}
  599|       |
  600|      0|	if (m_callbackBuf.empty()) {
  601|      0|		LOGERR(1, "callback buf is not initialized");
  602|      0|		return false;
  603|      0|	}
  604|       |
  605|      0|	const size_t bytes_written = callback(m_callbackBuf.data(), m_callbackBuf.size());
  606|       |
  607|      0|	if (bytes_written > m_callbackBuf.size()) {
  608|      0|		LOGERR(0, "send callback wrote " << bytes_written << " bytes, expected no more than " << m_callbackBuf.size() << " bytes");
  609|      0|		PANIC_STOP();
  610|      0|	}
  611|       |
  612|      0|	if (!bytes_written) {
  613|      0|		LOGWARN(1, "send callback failed");
  614|      0|		return false;
  615|      0|	}
  616|       |
  617|      0|	auto on_write = [this, client](const uint8_t* data, size_t size) {
  618|      0|		WriteBuf* buf = get_write_buffer(size);
  619|       |
  620|      0|		buf->m_write.data = buf;
  621|      0|		buf->m_client = client;
  622|       |
  623|      0|		memcpy(buf->m_data, data, size);
  624|       |
  625|      0|		uv_buf_t bufs[1];
  626|      0|		bufs[0].base = reinterpret_cast<char*>(buf->m_data);
  627|      0|		bufs[0].len = static_cast<uint32_t>(size);
  628|       |
  629|      0|		const int err = uv_write(&buf->m_write, reinterpret_cast<uv_stream_t*>(&client->m_socket), bufs, 1, Client::on_write);
  630|      0|		if (err) {
  631|      0|			LOGWARN(1, "failed to start writing data to client connection " << static_cast<const char*>(client->m_addrString) << ", error " << uv_err_name(err));
  632|      0|			return_write_buffer(buf);
  633|      0|			return false;
  634|      0|		}
  635|       |
  636|      0|		return true;
  637|      0|	};
  638|       |
  639|       |#ifdef WITH_TLS
  640|       |	if (!client->m_tls.is_empty() && !raw) {
  641|       |		if (!client->m_tls.on_write(m_callbackBuf.data(), bytes_written, std::move(on_write))) {
  642|       |			LOGWARN(1, "TLS write failed to client connection " << static_cast<const char*>(client->m_addrString));
  643|       |			return false;
  644|       |		}
  645|       |		return true;
  646|       |	}
  647|       |#else
  648|      0|	(void)raw;
  649|      0|#endif
  650|       |
  651|      0|	return on_write(m_callbackBuf.data(), bytes_written);
  652|      0|}

  654|       |const char* TCPServer::get_log_category() const
  655|      0|{
  656|      0|	return log_category_prefix;

  658|       |
  659|       |void TCPServer::loop(void* data)
  660|      0|{
  661|      0|	TCPServer* server = static_cast<TCPServer*>(data);
  662|       |
  663|      0|	log_category_prefix = server->get_log_category();
  664|      0|	{
  665|      0|		size_t n = strlen(log_category_prefix);
  666|       |
  667|      0|		if (n > 1) {
  668|       |			// Discard the last character (space)
  669|      0|			--n;
  670|       |
  671|      0|			char buf[16] = {};
  672|       |
  673|      0|			if (n < sizeof(buf)) {
  674|       |				// Set the thread name as is
  675|      0|				memcpy(buf, log_category_prefix, n);
  676|      0|				buf[n] = '\0';
  677|      0|			}
  678|      0|			else {
  679|       |				// Thread name is too long, use the "first 7 characters - last 7 characters" format
  680|      0|				constexpr size_t k = sizeof(buf) / 2 - 1;
  681|       |
  682|      0|				memcpy(buf, log_category_prefix, k);
  683|      0|				buf[k] = '-';
  684|      0|				memcpy(buf + k + 1, log_category_prefix + n - k, k);
  685|      0|			}
  686|       |
  687|      0|			set_thread_name(buf);
  688|      0|		}
  689|      0|		else {
  690|      0|			set_thread_name("TCPServer");
  691|      0|		}
  692|      0|	}
  693|       |
  694|      0|	LOGINFO(1, "event loop started");
  695|      0|	server_event_loop_thread = data;
  696|       |
  697|       |	// Allocate lists for up to max possible buffer size
  698|       |	// 128 buckets for callback buf = 131072 bytes
  699|      0|	uint64_t adjusted_size;
  700|      0|	server->m_writeBufferLists.resize(get_bucket_index(server->m_callbackBuf.size(), adjusted_size) + 1);
  701|       |
  702|      0|	server->m_preallocatedClients.reserve(server->m_defaultBacklog);
  703|      0|	for (int i = 0; i < server->m_defaultBacklog; ++i) {
  704|      0|		Client* c = server->m_allocateNewClient();
  705|      0|		c->asan_poison_this();
  706|      0|		server->m_preallocatedClients.emplace_back(c);
  707|      0|	}
  708|       |
  709|      0|	int err = uv_run(&server->m_loop, UV_RUN_DEFAULT);
  710|      0|	if (err) {
  711|      0|		LOGWARN(1, "uv_run returned " << err);
  712|      0|	}
  713|       |
  714|      0|	err = uv_loop_close(&server->m_loop);
  715|      0|	if (err) {
  716|      0|		LOGWARN(1, "uv_loop_close returned error " << uv_err_name(err));
  717|      0|	}
  718|       |
  719|      0|	for (size_t i = 0, n = server->m_writeBufferLists.size(); i < n; ++i) {
  720|      0|		const WriteBuf* buf = server->m_writeBufferLists[i];
  721|       |
  722|      0|		while (buf) {
  723|      0|			ASAN_UNPOISON_MEMORY_REGION(buf, sizeof(WriteBuf));
  724|      0|			if (buf->m_data) {
  725|      0|				ASAN_UNPOISON_MEMORY_REGION(buf->m_data, buf->m_dataCapacity);
  726|      0|				free_hook(buf->m_data);
  727|      0|			}
  728|      0|			const WriteBuf* t = buf;
  729|      0|			buf = buf->m_next;
  730|      0|			delete t;
  731|      0|		}
  732|      0|	}
  733|      0|	server->m_writeBufferLists.clear();
  734|       |
  735|      0|	for (Client* c : server->m_preallocatedClients) {
  736|      0|		ASAN_UNPOISON_MEMORY_REGION(c, sizeof(Client));
  737|      0|		ASAN_UNPOISON_MEMORY_REGION(c, c->get_size());
  738|      0|		delete c;
  739|      0|	}
  740|      0|	server->m_preallocatedClients.clear();
  741|       |
  742|      0|	LOGINFO(1, "event loop stopped");
  743|      0|}
  744|       |
  745|       |void TCPServer::on_new_connection(uv_stream_t* server, int status)
  746|      0|{
  747|      0|	TCPServer* pThis = static_cast<TCPServer*>(server->data);
  748|       |
  749|      0|	if (pThis->m_finished.load()) {
  750|      0|		return;
  751|      0|	}
  752|       |

  754|      0|		LOGWARN(1, "new connection error " << uv_strerror(status));

  757|       |
  758|      0|	pThis->on_new_client(server);
