   15|       | * along with this program. If not, see <http://www.gnu.org/licenses/>.
   16|       | */
   17|       |
   18|       |#include "common.h"
   19|       |#include "uv_util.h"
   20|       |#include "thread_pool.h"
   21|       |#include "gtest/gtest.h"
   22|       |#include <thread>
   23|       |#include <atomic>
   24|       |#include <vector>
   25|       |#include <chrono>
   26|       |
   27|       |namespace p2pool {
   28|       |
   29|       |TEST(thread_pool, parallel_run)
   30|      1|{
   31|      1|	using namespace std;
   32|      1|	using namespace chrono;
   33|       |
   34|      1|	thread_pool_init();
   35|       |
   36|      1|	constexpr uint32_t NUM_CALLER_THREADS = 4;
   37|      1|	constexpr uint32_t ITERATIONS_PER_THREAD = 25000;
   38|       |
   39|      1|	atomic<uint64_t> completed_runs = 0;
   40|      1|	atomic<bool> finished = false;
   41|      1|	atomic<bool> wrong_thread_count = false;
   42|       |
   43|      1|	thread watchdog([&completed_runs, &finished]() {
   44|      1|		uint64_t last = 0;
   45|      1|		auto last_changed = steady_clock::now();
   46|       |
   47|  53.0k|		while (!finished.load(memory_order_acquire)) {
   48|  53.0k|			this_thread::sleep_for(milliseconds(1));
   49|       |
   50|  53.0k|			const uint64_t now = completed_runs.load(memory_order_relaxed);
   51|       |
   52|  53.0k|			if (now != last) {
   53|  38.7k|				last = now;
   54|  38.7k|				last_changed = steady_clock::now();
   55|  38.7k|			}
   56|  14.3k|			else {
   57|  14.3k|				const double dt = static_cast<double>(duration_cast<nanoseconds>(steady_clock::now() - last_changed).count()) / 1e9;
   58|       |
   59|  14.3k|				if (dt >= 10.0) {
   60|      0|					fprintf(stderr, "no progress for %.3fs after %lu runs - parallel_run() lost a thread (work-assignment race -> deadlock)\n", dt, now);
   61|      0|					fflush(stderr);
   62|      0|					abort();
   63|      0|				}
   64|  14.3k|			}
   65|  53.0k|		}
   66|      1|	});
   67|       |
   68|      1|	const uint32_t cap = min<uint32_t>(thread::hardware_concurrency(), 16u);
   69|      1|	const uint32_t effective_total = (cap <= 1) ? 1u : cap;
   70|       |
   71|      1|	vector<thread> callers;
   72|      1|	callers.reserve(NUM_CALLER_THREADS);
   73|       |
   74|      5|	for (uint32_t t = 0; t < NUM_CALLER_THREADS; ++t) {
   75|      4|		callers.emplace_back([t, effective_total, &completed_runs, &wrong_thread_count, ITERATIONS_PER_THREAD]() {
   76|  99.7k|			for (uint32_t it = 0; it < ITERATIONS_PER_THREAD; ++it) {
   77|  99.7k|				const uint32_t N = 2u + ((it + t) % 3u);
   78|       |
   79|  99.7k|				atomic<uint32_t> counter = 0;
   80|  99.7k|				atomic<uint32_t> participated = 0;
   81|       |
   82|   399k|				parallel_run([N, &counter, &participated](uint32_t thread_index, uint32_t total_thread_count) {
   83|   399k|					const uint32_t thread_count = min<uint32_t>(total_thread_count, N);
   84|       |
   85|   399k|					if (thread_index >= thread_count) {
   86|  99.9k|						return;
   87|  99.9k|					}
   88|       |
   89|   299k|					participated.fetch_add(1, memory_order_relaxed);
   90|       |
   91|   299k|					sync_point(counter, thread_count);
   92|   299k|					sync_point(counter, thread_count * 2u);
   93|   299k|				}, true);
   94|       |
   95|  99.7k|				const uint32_t expected = min<uint32_t>(effective_total, N);
   96|       |
   97|  99.7k|				if (participated.load(memory_order_relaxed) != expected) {
   98|      0|					wrong_thread_count.store(true, memory_order_relaxed);
   99|      0|				}
  100|       |
  101|  99.7k|				completed_runs.fetch_add(1, memory_order_relaxed);
  102|  99.7k|			}
  103|      4|		});
  104|      4|	}
  105|       |
  106|      4|	for (thread& c : callers) {
  107|      4|		c.join();
  108|      4|	}
  109|       |
  110|      1|	finished.store(true, memory_order_release);
  111|      1|	watchdog.join();
  112|       |
  113|      1|	EXPECT_FALSE(wrong_thread_count.load(memory_order_relaxed));
  114|      1|	EXPECT_EQ(completed_runs.load(memory_order_relaxed), static_cast<uint64_t>(NUM_CALLER_THREADS) * ITERATIONS_PER_THREAD);
  115|       |
  116|      1|	thread_pool_destroy();
  117|      1|}
  118|       |
  119|       |} // namespace p2pool

   27|       |TEST(util, varint)
   28|      1|{
   29|      1|	std::vector<uint8_t> v;
   30|      1|	v.reserve(16);
   31|       |
   32|      1|	uint64_t check;
   33|       |
   34|       |	// 0...2^7 - 1
   35|    129|	for (uint64_t value = 0; value < 0x80; ++value) {
   36|    128|		v.clear();
   37|    128|		writeVarint(value, v);
   38|    128|		ASSERT_EQ(v.size(), 1);
   39|    128|		ASSERT_EQ(v[0], value);
   40|    128|		ASSERT_EQ(readVarint(v.data(), v.data() + v.size(), check), v.data() + v.size());
   41|    128|		ASSERT_EQ(check, value);
   42|    128|	}
   43|       |
   44|       |	// 2^7...2^14 - 1
   45|  16.2k|	for (uint64_t value = 0x80; value < 0x4000; ++value) {
   46|  16.2k|		v.clear();
   47|  16.2k|		writeVarint(value, v);
   48|  16.2k|		ASSERT_EQ(v.size(), 2);
   49|  16.2k|		ASSERT_EQ(v[0], (value & 0x7F) | 0x80);
   50|  16.2k|		ASSERT_EQ(v[1], value >> 7);
   51|  16.2k|		ASSERT_EQ(readVarint(v.data(), v.data() + v.size(), check), v.data() + v.size());
   52|  16.2k|		ASSERT_EQ(check, value);
   53|  16.2k|	}
   54|       |
   55|       |	// 2^14...2^21 - 1
   56|  2.08M|	for (uint64_t value = 0x4000; value < 0x200000; ++value) {
   57|  2.08M|		v.clear();
   58|  2.08M|		writeVarint(value, v);
   59|  2.08M|		ASSERT_EQ(v.size(), 3);
   60|  2.08M|		ASSERT_EQ(v[0], (value & 0x7F) | 0x80);
   61|  2.08M|		ASSERT_EQ(v[1], ((value >> 7) & 0x7F) | 0x80);
   62|  2.08M|		ASSERT_EQ(v[2], value >> 14);
   63|  2.08M|		ASSERT_EQ(readVarint(v.data(), v.data() + v.size(), check), v.data() + v.size());
   64|  2.08M|		ASSERT_EQ(check, value);
   65|  2.08M|	}
   66|       |
   67|       |	// 2^64 - 1
   68|      1|	v.clear();
   69|      1|	writeVarint(std::numeric_limits<uint64_t>::max(), v);
   70|      1|	ASSERT_EQ(v.size(), 10);
   71|     10|	for (int i = 0; i < 9; ++i) {
   72|      9|		ASSERT_EQ(v[i], 0xFF);
   73|      9|	}
   74|      1|	ASSERT_EQ(v[9], 1);
   75|      1|	ASSERT_EQ(readVarint(v.data(), v.data() + v.size(), check), v.data() + v.size());
   76|      1|	ASSERT_EQ(check, std::numeric_limits<uint64_t>::max());
   77|       |
   78|       |	// Invalid value 1
   79|      1|	uint8_t buf[16];
   80|      1|	memset(buf, -1, sizeof(buf));
   81|      1|	ASSERT_EQ(readVarint(buf, buf + sizeof(buf), check), nullptr);
   82|       |
   83|       |	// Invalid value 2
   84|      1|	uint8_t buf2[1] = { 0x80 };
   85|      1|	ASSERT_EQ(readVarint(buf2, buf2 + 1, check), nullptr);
   86|       |
   87|       |	// Invalid value 3
   88|      1|	uint8_t buf3[16];
   89|      1|	memset(buf3, 128, sizeof(buf3));
   90|      1|	ASSERT_EQ(readVarint(buf3, buf3 + sizeof(buf3), check), nullptr);
   91|       |
   92|       |	// Invalid value 4
   93|      1|	uint32_t check2;
   94|      1|	uint8_t buf4[] = {255, 255, 255, 255, 127};
   95|      1|	ASSERT_EQ(readVarint(buf4, buf4 + sizeof(buf4), check2), nullptr);
   96|       |
   97|       |	// Invalid value 5
   98|      1|	uint8_t buf5[] = {128, 0};
   99|      1|	ASSERT_EQ(readVarint(buf5, buf5 + sizeof(buf5), check), nullptr);
  100|       |
  101|       |	// Invalid value 6 (2^64)
  102|      1|	uint8_t buf6[] = {128, 128, 128, 128, 128, 128, 128, 128, 128, 2};
  103|      1|	ASSERT_EQ(readVarint(buf6, buf6 + sizeof(buf6), check), nullptr);
  104|      1|}

  118|       |TEST(util, onion)

  314|       |TEST(util, get_bucket_index)
  315|      1|{
  316|      1|	static constexpr uint64_t sizes[] = {
  317|      1|		64,128,192,256,320,384,448,512,576,640,704,768,832,896,960,1024,
  318|      1|		1088,1152,1216,1280,1344,1408,1472,1536,1600,1664,1728,1792,1856,1920,1984,2048,
  319|      1|		2176,2304,2432,2560,2688,2816,2944,3072,3200,3328,3456,3584,3712,3840,3968,4096,
  320|      1|		4352,4608,4864,5120,5376,5632,5888,6144,6400,6656,6912,7168,7424,7680,7936,8192,
  321|      1|		8704,9216,9728,10240,10752,11264,11776,12288,12800,13312,13824,14336,14848,15360,15872,16384,
  322|      1|		17408,18432,19456,20480,21504,22528,23552,24576,25600,26624,27648,28672,29696,30720,31744,32768,
  323|      1|		34816,36864,38912,40960,43008,45056,47104,49152,51200,53248,55296,57344,59392,61440,63488,65536,
  324|      1|		69632,73728,77824,81920,86016,90112,94208,98304,102400,106496,110592,114688,118784,122880,126976,131072,
  325|      1|		139264,147456,155648,163840,172032,180224,188416,196608,204800,212992,221184,229376,237568,245760,253952,262144,
  326|      1|	};
  327|       |
  328|      1|	uint64_t size = 0;
  329|       |
  330|    145|	for (size_t i = 0, n = array_size(sizes); i < n; ++i) {
  331|   262k|		while (size <= sizes[i]) {
  332|   262k|			uint64_t adjusted_size;
  333|   262k|			ASSERT_EQ(get_bucket_index(size, adjusted_size), i);
  334|   262k|			ASSERT_EQ(adjusted_size, sizes[i]);
  335|   262k|			++size;
  336|   262k|		}
  337|    144|	}

   32|       |
   33|       |	// Wrong length
   34|      1|	{
   35|      1|		Wallet w("456");
   36|      1|		ASSERT_FALSE(w.valid());
   37|      1|	}
   38|       |
   39|       |	// Symbol '0' is not from base-58
   40|      1|	{
   41|      1|		Wallet w("40ccoSmrBTPJd5yf8VYCULh4J5rHQaXP1TeC8Cnqhd5H9Y2cMwkJ9w42euLmMghKtCiQcgZEiGYW1K6Ae4biZ7w1HLSexS6");

   43|      1|	}
   44|       |
   45|       |	// Invalid checksum
   46|      1|	{

   49|      1|	}
   50|       |

   55|      1|	}
   56|       |

   60|      1|		ASSERT_FALSE(w.valid());
   61|      1|	}
   62|       |
   63|       |	// Invalid pubkeys
   64|      1|	{
   65|      1|		Wallet w(nullptr);
   66|       |
   67|      1|		constexpr hash invalid_spend_pub = keccak("invalid spend pub key 1");
   68|      1|		constexpr hash valid_spend_pub = keccak("valid spend pub key 2");
   69|       |
   70|      1|		constexpr hash invalid_view_pub = keccak("invalid view pub key 3");

   72|       |

   74|      1|		ASSERT_FALSE(w.assign(invalid_spend_pub, valid_view_pub, NetworkType::Mainnet, false));
   75|      1|		ASSERT_FALSE(w.assign(valid_spend_pub, invalid_view_pub, NetworkType::Mainnet, false));
   76|      1|		ASSERT_FALSE(w.assign(invalid_spend_pub, invalid_view_pub, NetworkType::Mainnet, false));
   77|      1|	}
   78|       |
   79|       |	// Invalid prefix
   80|      1|	{
   81|      1|		Wallet w1("4KKHpFbLniuJd5yf8VYCULh4J5rHQaXP1TeC8Cnqhd5H9Y2cMwkJ9w42euLmMghKtCiQcgZEiGYW1K6Ae4biZ7w1HLSexS6");

   83|       |
   84|      1|		ASSERT_TRUE(w2.assign(w2.spend_public_key(), w2.view_public_key(), NetworkType::Invalid, false));
   85|       |
   86|      1|		ASSERT_FALSE(w1.valid());
   87|      1|		ASSERT_FALSE(w2.valid());
   88|      1|	}
   89|       |
   90|      1|	auto check = [](NetworkType t, bool subaddress, uint64_t prefix, uint32_t checksum, const char* address, const char* spendkey, const char* viewkey)
   91|     12|	{
   92|       |		// Test Wallet::decode()
   93|     12|		Wallet w(address);
   94|     12|		ASSERT_TRUE(w.valid());
   95|     12|		ASSERT_EQ(w.get_type(), t);
   96|     12|		ASSERT_EQ(w.is_subaddress(), subaddress);
   97|     12|		ASSERT_EQ(w.prefix(), prefix);
   98|     12|		ASSERT_EQ(w.checksum(), checksum);
   99|       |
  100|     12|		char buf[log::Stream::BUF_SIZE + 1];
  101|     12|		log::Stream s(buf);
  102|       |
  103|     12|		s << w.spend_public_key();
  104|     12|		ASSERT_EQ(memcmp(buf, spendkey, HASH_SIZE * 2), 0);
  105|       |
  106|     12|		s.m_pos = 0;
  107|     12|		s << w.view_public_key();
  108|     12|		ASSERT_EQ(memcmp(buf, viewkey, HASH_SIZE * 2), 0);
  109|       |
  110|       |		// Test Wallet copy
  111|     12|		Wallet w1(w);
  112|       |
  113|     12|		ASSERT_EQ(w1.prefix(),           w.prefix());
  114|     12|		ASSERT_EQ(w1.spend_public_key(), w.spend_public_key());
  115|     12|		ASSERT_EQ(w1.view_public_key(),  w.view_public_key());
  116|     12|		ASSERT_EQ(w1.checksum(),         w.checksum());
  117|     12|		ASSERT_EQ(w1.get_type(),         w.get_type());
  118|     12|		ASSERT_EQ(w1.is_subaddress(),    w.is_subaddress());
  119|       |
  120|       |		// Test Wallet::assign()
  121|     12|		Wallet w2(nullptr);
  122|     12|		ASSERT_TRUE(w2.assign(w.spend_public_key(), w.view_public_key(), w.get_type(), w.is_subaddress()));
  123|       |
  124|     12|		ASSERT_EQ(w2.prefix(),           w.prefix());
  125|     12|		ASSERT_EQ(w2.spend_public_key(), w.spend_public_key());
  126|     12|		ASSERT_EQ(w2.view_public_key(),  w.view_public_key());
  127|     12|		ASSERT_EQ(w2.checksum(),         w.checksum());
  128|     12|		ASSERT_EQ(w2.get_type(),         w.get_type());
  129|     12|		ASSERT_EQ(w2.is_subaddress(),    w.is_subaddress());
  130|       |
  131|       |		// Test Wallet::encode()
  132|     12|		const std::string s0 = address;
  133|     12|		const std::string s1 = w.encode();
  134|     12|		const std::string s2 = w2.encode();
  135|     12|		ASSERT_EQ(s1, s0);
  136|     12|		ASSERT_EQ(s2, s0);
  137|       |
  138|       |		// Test Wallet::encode(buf)
  139|     12|		char buf1[Wallet::ADDRESS_LENGTH] = {};
  140|     12|		w.encode(buf1);
  141|     12|		ASSERT_EQ(memcmp(buf1, address, Wallet::ADDRESS_LENGTH), 0);
  142|       |
  143|     12|		char buf2[Wallet::ADDRESS_LENGTH] = {};
  144|     12|		w2.encode(buf2);
  145|     12|		ASSERT_EQ(memcmp(buf2, address, Wallet::ADDRESS_LENGTH), 0);
  146|     12|	};
